#load in of packages
```{r}
pacman::p_load("stringr","gplots","ggplot2","ComplexHeatmap", "limma", "edgeR", "tibble", "Homo.sapiens", "dplyr", "tidyr", "readr", "circlize", "RColorBrewer", "dendextend", "openxlsx","writexl","AnnotationDbi", "clusterProfiler", "org.Hs.eg.db", "tibble","statmod","ggbio", "Mfuzz", "ggupset", "enrichplot", "ComplexUpset", "UpSetR", "gridExtra", "gridtext", "enrichplot", "enrichR", "ggpubr","pracma", "ggh4x","eulerr", "marray", "ggplotify", "corrplot", "cowplot", "forcats", "biomaRt", "DESeq2", "ggpattern", "ssizeRNA", "Polychrome", "devtools", "EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86", "AnnotationHub", "ensembldb","GeneStructureTools","BiocFileCache", "BiocManager", "GO.db", "viridis", "ggridges", "memes", "scales", "ggtext", "htmltools", "drc", "export", "rstatix", "VennDiagram", "ReactomePA", "HGNChelper", "hgu133plus2.db", "ggbreak", "tidyverse", "pcaMethods", "imputeLCMD","vsn", "impute", "samr", "cosinor", "minpack.lm", "ggrepel", "arrow", "MuSiC", "SingleCellExperiment", "TOAST", "limSolve", "data.table", "lme4", "emmeans","cellxgene.census", "json", "httr", "readr", "stringr", "zellkonverter", "HDF5Array", "scater", "broom.mixed", "DeconRNASeq", "curl")
```

#Count and sample data read in
```{r}
counts <- read.table("data/counts20250625.txt", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(counts) <- gsub("\\.[0-9]*$", "", rownames(counts))

#remove P04 +24 h sample
counts <- counts[, -35]

sampledata <- read.xlsx("data/20230911_sampledata-rnaseq.xlsx")
sampledata <- na.omit(sampledata)

#remove P04 +24 h sample
sampledata <- sampledata %>% dplyr::filter(sample != "35")
```

#Differential expression analysis using limma (~0 + sex + time)
```{r}
group <- sampledata$time
y <- DGEList(counts = counts, group = group)

sex <- sampledata$Sex
sampleid <- sampledata$SAMPLE.ID

y$samples$sex <- as.factor(sex)
y$samples$sampleid <- as.factor(sampleid)

y_unfilt <- y

cpm <- edgeR::cpm(y)
lcpm <- edgeR::cpm(y, log=TRUE)

L <- mean(y$samples$lib.size) * 1e-6
M <- median(y$samples$lib.size) * 1e-6
c(L, M)
summary(lcpm)

table(rowSums(y$counts==0)==352)
keep.exprs <- filterByExpr(y, group=group)

y <- y[keep.exprs,,keep.lib.sizes=FALSE]
dim(y)

totalcounts <- mean(y$samples$lib.size) *1e-6

y <- calcNormFactors(y, method = "TMM")
y$samples$norm.factors

design <- model.matrix(~0 + group + sex, y$samples)
colnames(design) <- gsub("group", "", colnames(design))

contr.matrix <- makeContrasts(
 "MIDvsPRE" = MID-PRE,
 "POSTvsPRE" = POST-PRE,
 "H3vsPRE" = threeH-PRE,
 "H6vsPRE" = sixH-PRE,
 "H9vsPRE" = nineH-PRE,
 "H12vsPRE" = twelveH-PRE,
 "H24vsPRE" = twentyfourH-PRE,
 "H48vsPRE" = fourtyeightH-PRE,
  levels = colnames(design))
contr.matrix

fit <- voomLmFit(y, design = design, block = sampleid, keep.EList = TRUE, plot = TRUE, save.plot = FALSE)
fit <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrasts=contr.matrix)
efit <- eBayes(fit)

summary(decideTests(efit, adjust.method = "BH"))

rna_compALL <- topTable(efit, n=Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
rna_comp <- subset(rna_compALL, rna_compALL$adj.P.Val<0.05)
```

#Transcriptomic and protein coding coverage in skeletal muscle (ENCODE & HPA databases) (Supp fig 1a and 1b)
```{r}
#ENCODE database for skeletal muscle (date retrieved indicated within the file name)(Supp fig 1a)

ENCODE <- read_tsv("data/Databases/rna_expression_report_2025_6_26_1h_31m.tsv")

#filtered for only genes with a TPM greater than zero

ENCODE_filtered <- ENCODE[ENCODE$TPM > 0, ]

ENCODE_filtered$`Feature ID` <- sub("\\..*", "", ENCODE_filtered$`Feature ID`)

alldetections <- rownames(rna_compALL)

DetectonlyinSeq <- as.numeric(length(setdiff(alldetections, ENCODE_filtered$`Feature ID`)))
detectedENCODE <- as.numeric(length(intersect(alldetections, ENCODE_filtered$`Feature ID`)))
NotdetectENCODE <- as.numeric(length(setdiff(ENCODE_filtered$`Feature ID`, alldetections)))

ENCODEpiechart <- data.frame(
  category = c("Not quantified and in the ENCODE database",
               "Quantified and not in the ENCODE database",
               "Quantified and in the ENCODE database"),
  value = c(NotdetectENCODE, DetectonlyinSeq, detectedENCODE))

category_colors2 <- c("#cdf7d7",  "lightgrey", "#e8faed")

ENCODEpiechart$category <- factor(
  ENCODEpiechart$category,
  levels = c("Quantified and in the ENCODE database",
             "Not quantified and in the ENCODE database",
             "Quantified and not in the ENCODE database")
)

ggplot(ENCODEpiechart, aes(x = "", y = value, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1, stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = category_colors2) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = NULL, fill = "Transcriptomic coverage") +
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = value),
    size = 6, nudge_x = 1.25, show.legend = FALSE, segment.color = "black"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0, 1, 0, 0, "cm")
  )

export::graph2doc(file="ENCODEdetections.docx", width=7,height=3)

#HPA skeletal muscle database (date retrieved indicated within the file name)(Supp fig 1b)

mart <- useEnsembl(biomart = "genes", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

proteincoding <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype"),
                     filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                     values = alldetections,
                     mart = mart)

proteincoding <- proteincoding %>%
                    dplyr::filter(gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
proteincoding <- proteincoding$ensembl_gene_id

HPAmuscle <- read_tsv("data/Databases/muscleHPA220124.tsv")
HPAmuscleproteins <- HPAmuscle$Ensembl

NotdetectHPA <- as.numeric(length(setdiff(HPAmuscleproteins, alldetections)))
detectednotHPA <- as.numeric(length(setdiff(proteincoding, HPAmuscleproteins)))
detectedHPA <- as.numeric(length(intersect(alldetections, HPAmuscleproteins)))

HPApiechart <- data.frame(
  category = c("Quantified and in the Human Protein Atlas",
               "Quantified and not in the Human Protein Atlas",
               "Not quantified and in the Human Protein Atlas"
               ),
  value = c(detectedHPA, detectednotHPA, NotdetectHPA))

category_colors3 <- c("#93b7fa", "#c0d5fb", "grey")

HPApiechart$category <- factor(
  HPApiechart$category,
  levels = c("Quantified and in the Human Protein Atlas",
               "Quantified and not in the Human Protein Atlas",
               "Not quantified and in the Human Protein Atlas"
               )
)

HPApiechart$label <- paste0(HPApiechart$value)

ggplot(HPApiechart, aes(x = "", y = value, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1, stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = category_colors3) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = NULL, fill = "Protein-encoding gene coverage") +
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = value),
    size = 6, nudge_x = 1.25, show.legend = FALSE, force = 3500, segment.color = "black"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0, 1, 0, 0, "cm")
  )

export::graph2doc(file="HPAdetections.docx", width=8,height=3)
```

#Inter-individual variability of CPM values (normalised by lib size) (Supp fig 1c)
```{r}
CVfunction <- function(counts) {
  all_genes <- rownames(rna_compALL)
  participant_ids <- unique(sampledata$SAMPLE.ID)
  desired_order <- c(5, 2, 4, 7, 6, 3, 8, 9, 1)
      
  features <- data.frame(gene = character(length(all_genes)),
                         timePRECV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         timeMIDCV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time0CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time3CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time6CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time9CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time12CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time24CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         time48CV = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
   
  for (i in seq_along(all_genes)) {
    gene <- all_genes[i]
   
    genedata <- y$counts
    genedata <- edgeR::cpm(genedata)
    genedata <- as.matrix(tapply(genedata[gene, ], list(sampleid, group), mean))
    genedata <- genedata[, desired_order]
    genedata <- genedata[, 1:9]
    colnames(genedata) <- c("PRE", "MID", "0", "3", "6", "9", "12", "24", "48")

    timePRE <- genedata[, "PRE"]
    timePRE <- na.omit(timePRE)
    timePRECV <- sd(timePRE)/mean(timePRE)
    timeMID <- genedata[, "MID"]
    timeMID <- na.omit(timeMID)
    timeMIDCV <- sd(timeMID)/mean(timeMID)
    time0 <- genedata[, "0"]
    time0 <- na.omit(time0)
    time0CV <- sd(time0)/mean(time0)
    time3 <- genedata[, "3"]
    time3 <- na.omit(time3)
    time3CV <- sd(time3)/mean(time3)
    time6 <- genedata[, "6"]
    time6 <- na.omit(time6)
    time6CV <- sd(time6)/mean(time6)
    time9 <- genedata[, "9"]
    time9 <- na.omit(time9)
    time9CV <- sd(time9)/mean(time9)
    time12 <- genedata[, "12"]
    time12 <- na.omit(time12)
    time12CV <- sd(time12)/mean(time12)
    time24 <- genedata[, "24"]
    time24 <- na.omit(time24)
    time24CV <- sd(time24)/mean(time24)
    time48 <- genedata[, "48"]
    time48 <- na.omit(time48)
    time48CV <- sd(time48)/mean(time48)

    features[i, ] <- list(gene = gene,
                          timePRECV = timePRECV*100,
                          timeMIDCV = timeMIDCV*100,
                          time0CV = time0CV*100,
                          time3CV = time3CV*100,
                          time6CV = time6CV*100,
                          time9CV = time9CV*100,
                          time12CV = time12CV*100,
                          time24CV= time24CV*100,
                          time48CV = time48CV*100)
    
  }

  return(features)
}

CVcpm <- CVfunction(counts)

CVplot <- gather(CVcpm, key = "Time", value = "CV", -gene)
  
label_mapping <- c(
  "timePRECV" = "PRE",
  "timeMIDCV" = "MID",
  "time0CV" = "+0 h",
  "time3CV" = "+3 h",
  "time6CV" = "+6 h",
  "time9CV" = "+9 h",
  "time12CV" = "+12 h",
  "time24CV" = "+24 h",
  "time48CV" = "+48 h"
)

CVplot$Time <- label_mapping[CVplot$Time]
CVplot$Time <- as.character(CVplot$Time)
CVplot$Time <- factor(CVplot$Time, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h"))

timecolours <- c("#f01d1d", "#FF7F00", "#FFFF33", "#9ef576", "#3b8739", "#34ebe8", "#3a09d9", "#a957b5", "#A65628")

average_CV_by_Time <- CVplot %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  summarize(average_CV = median(CV, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot(CVplot, aes(x=Time, y = CV, fill=Time)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=timecolours, breaks = unique(CVplot$Time)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape =NA, 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               show.legend = FALSE) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), limits = c(0, 120)) +
  labs(x= NULL, y = "Coefficient of variation (%)") +
  ggtitle("Inter-individual variability") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=18))
   
export::graph2doc(file="CVallparticipants.docx", width=5,height=4)
```

#MDS plot of all samples (normalised CPM values) (Supp fig 1d)
```{r}
mds_data_voom <- plotMDS.DGEList(y)
mds_data_voom <- data.frame(x=mds_data_voom$x,y=mds_data_voom$y, sampledata)

legend_label <- c("PRE" = "PRE", "MID" = "MID", "POST"="+0 h", "threeH"="+3 h", "sixH"="+6 h", "nineH"="+9 h", "twelveH"="+12 h", "twentyfourH"="+24 h", "fourtyeightH"="+48 h")

ggplot(mds_data_voom,aes(x=x,y=y)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=as.factor(time),
                 shape=as.factor(sex),
                 fill=as.factor(time)),
              size=3) +
  labs(x = "Dimension 1 (19%)",
       y = "Dimension 2 (9%)",
       colour = "Time point",
       shape = "Sex") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(mds_data_voom$x, n=14)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = pretty(mds_data_voom$y, n=14)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = timecolours,
                      labels = legend_label,
                      limits=c("PRE", "MID", "POST", "threeH",
                               "sixH", "nineH", "twelveH",
                               "twentyfourH", "fourtyeightH")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = timecolours,
                      labels = legend_label,
                      limits=c("PRE", "MID", "POST",
                               "threeH", "sixH", "nineH",
                               "twelveH", "twentyfourH", "fourtyeightH")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(F=24,M=22),labels=c("F"="Females", "M"="Males")) + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14)) +
  ggtitle("MDS plot of RNA-seq time course")

export::graph2doc(file="MDSallparticipants.docx", width=8.5,height=6.5)
```

#Getting a list of DEGs for each time point, up/down regulation, and their adj p-values
```{r}
top_treat <- function(coef, efit) {
    result <- topTreat(efit, coef = coef, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
    result <- subset(result, result$adj.P.Val < 0.05)
    return(result)
  }
  
MIDvsPRE <- top_treat(1, efit)
POSTvsPRE <- top_treat(2, efit)
H3vsPRE <- top_treat(3, efit)
H6vsPRE <- top_treat(4, efit)
H9vsPRE <- top_treat(5, efit)
H12vsPRE <- top_treat(6, efit)
H24vsPRE <- top_treat(7, efit)
H48vsPRE <- top_treat(8, efit)
  
MIDvsPREdown <- MIDvsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
MIDvsPREup <- MIDvsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
POSTvsPREdown <- POSTvsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
POSTvsPREup <- POSTvsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H3vsPREdown <- H3vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H3vsPREup <- H3vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H6vsPREdown <- H6vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H6vsPREup <- H6vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H9vsPREdown <- H9vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H9vsPREup <- H9vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H12vsPREdown <- H12vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H12vsPREup <- H12vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H24vsPREdown <- H24vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H24vsPREup <- H24vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
H48vsPREdown <- H48vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
H48vsPREup <- H48vsPRE %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)

allupregulated <- c(rownames(MIDvsPREup), rownames(POSTvsPREup), rownames(H3vsPREup), rownames(H6vsPREup), rownames(H9vsPREup), rownames(H12vsPREup), rownames(H24vsPREup), rownames(H48vsPREup))
allupregulated <- unique(allupregulated)

alldownregulated <- c(rownames(MIDvsPREdown), rownames(POSTvsPREdown), rownames(H3vsPREdown), rownames(H6vsPREdown), rownames(H9vsPREdown), rownames(H12vsPREdown), rownames(H24vsPREdown), rownames(H48vsPREdown))
alldownregulated <- unique(alldownregulated)

allDEGs <- unique(c(allupregulated, alldownregulated))
```

#Overlap plot of previous exercise-induced DEGs compared to this study (Fig 1b)
```{r}
#DEGs in response to cardiorespriatory exercise. No logFC cutoff and significance defined as adjusted p-value < 0.05 unless raw data not provided and only a list of DEGs provided. I also assume they did the statistics correctly and had participant ID as a batching variable if I repeat the statistics.

#Popov et al. 2018
#read in of raw data and then DESeq2 as they performed (3 time points, 2 post exercise) (I did not filter genes based on expression by Human Protein Atlas as they did)
popov2018 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/popov2018.xlsx")
popov2018ensembl <- popov2018$Ensembl_gene_id
gene_symbols <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = popov2018ensembl,
                       keytype = "ENSEMBL",
                       column = "SYMBOL") 
gene_symbols <- as.data.frame(gene_symbols)
gene_symbols <- rownames_to_column(gene_symbols, var = "Ensembl_gene_id")
popov2018 <- merge(gene_symbols, popov2018, "Ensembl_gene_id")
popov2018 <- popov2018 %>% dplyr::select(gene_symbols, H0_rep2, H2_rep2, H3_rep2, H0_rep1, H2_rep1, H3_rep1)
popov2018 <- popov2018 %>% dplyr::filter(rowSums(. == 0) == 0)
sum_by_gene <- popov2018 %>%
  group_by(gene_symbols) %>%
  summarize(total_sum = sum(c_across(starts_with("H0_rep2"))))
popov2018 <- popov2018 %>%
  left_join(sum_by_gene, by = "gene_symbols") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_sum)) %>%
  distinct(gene_symbols, .keep_all = TRUE)
rownames(popov2018) <- popov2018$gene_symbols
popov2018 <- popov2018 %>% dplyr::select("H0_rep2", "H2_rep2", "H3_rep2", "H0_rep1", "H2_rep1", "H3_rep1")
popov2018 <- data.frame(apply(popov2018, 2, as.numeric), row.names = rownames(popov2018))
popov2018 <- round(popov2018, digits = 0)

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = popov2018,
                              colData = data.frame(
                              time = c("Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
                                        "Time1", "Time2", "Time3"),
                              participant = c(rep("Participant1", 3),
                                              rep("Participant2", 3))),
                              design = ~ participant + time)

dds <- DESeq(dds)

res1 <- DESeq2::results(dds, contrast=c("time", "Time2", "Time1"), alpha=0.05)

resOrdered1 <- res1[order(res1$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered1), 
          file="condition_treated_results2v1.csv")
popov2v1 <- read_csv("condition_treated_results2v1.csv")
popov2v1 <- subset(popov2v1 , popov2v1$padj<0.05)
popov2v1 <- popov2v1$...1

res2 <- DESeq2::results(dds, contrast=c("time", "Time3", "Time1"), alpha=0.05)

resOrdered2 <- res2[order(res2$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered2), 
          file="condition_treated_results3v1.csv")
popov3v1 <- read_csv("condition_treated_results3v1.csv")
popov3v1 <- subset(popov3v1 , popov3v1$padj<0.05)
popov3v1 <- popov3v1$...1

popov2018 <- c(popov2v1, popov3v1)
popov2018 <- unique(popov2018)

popov2018genes <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                  filters = "external_gene_name",
                  values = popov2018,
                  mart = mart)
popov2018 <- popov2018genes$ensembl_gene_id

#Popov et al. 2019 (same as above, performed DESeq2 on the raw data)
popov2019 <- read.table("data/GSE120862_FPKM.txt", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
col_names <- as.character(popov2019[1, ])
colnames(popov2019) <- col_names
popov2019 <- popov2019[-1, ]
popov2019 <- popov2019[,2:86]
popov2019 <- popov2019 %>% dplyr::filter(rowSums(. == 0) == 0)
rownames(popov2019) <- make.names(popov2019$gene_name, unique=TRUE)
popov2019 <- popov2019[,-1]
#openxlsx::write.xlsx(popov2019,"popov2019.xlsx", rowNames = TRUE)
cols_to_remove <- grep("NE", names(popov2019))
popov2019 <- popov2019[, -cols_to_remove]
popov2019 <- mutate_all(popov2019, as.numeric)

untrained_cols <- grep("untrained", colnames(popov2019), value = TRUE)
cols_to_remove <- c(untrained_cols)

df_trained <- popov2019[, -which(colnames(popov2019) %in% untrained_cols)]
df_untrained <- popov2019[, untrained_cols]

dds2 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(df_untrained),
  colData = data.frame(
    time = c("Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
                    "Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
                    "Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
                    "Time1", "Time2", "Time3"),
    participant = c(rep("Participant1", 3),
                    rep("Participant2", 3),
                    rep("Participant3", 3),
                    rep("Participant4", 3),
                    rep("Participant5", 3),
                    rep("Participant6", 3),
                    rep("Participant7", 3) )
  ),
  design = ~ participant + time
)

dds2 <- DESeq(dds2)

dds3 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(df_trained),
  colData = data.frame(
    time = c("Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
              "Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
              "Time1", "Time2", "Time3", "Time1", "Time2", "Time3",
              "Time1", "Time2", "Time3"),
    participant = c(rep("Participant1", 3),
                    rep("Participant2", 3),
                    rep("Participant3", 3),
                    rep("Participant4", 3),
                    rep("Participant5", 3),
                    rep("Participant6", 3),
                    rep("Participant7", 3) )
  ),
  design = ~ participant + time
)

dds3 <- DESeq(dds3)

res3 <- DESeq2::results(dds2, contrast=c("time", "Time2", "Time1"), alpha=0.05)
results3 <- as.data.frame(res3@listData)

resOrdered3 <- res3[order(res3$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered3), 
          file="popovuntrained2v1.csv")
popov20192v1untrained <- read_csv("popovuntrained2v1.csv")
popov20192v1untrained <- subset(popov20192v1untrained , popov20192v1untrained$padj<0.05)
popov20192v1untrained <- popov20192v1untrained$...1

res4 <- DESeq2::results(dds2, contrast=c("time", "Time3", "Time1"))

resOrdered4 <- res4[order(res4$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered4), 
          file="popovuntrained3v1.csv")
popov20193v1untrained <- read_csv("popovuntrained3v1.csv")
popov20193v1untrained <- subset(popov20193v1untrained , popov20193v1untrained$padj<0.05)
popov20193v1untrained <- popov20193v1untrained$...1

res5 <- DESeq2::results(dds3, contrast=c("time", "Time2", "Time1"))

resOrdered5 <- res5[order(res5$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered5), 
          file="popovtrained2v1.csv")
popov20192v1trained <- read_csv("popovtrained2v1.csv")
popov20192v1trained <- subset(popov20192v1trained , popov20192v1trained$padj<0.05)
popov20192v1trained <- popov20192v1trained$...1

res6 <- DESeq2::results(dds3, contrast=c("time", "Time3", "Time1"))
results6 <- as.data.frame(res6@listData)

resOrdered6 <- res6[order(res6$padj),]
write.csv(as.data.frame(resOrdered6), 
          file="popovtrained3v1.csv")
popov20193v1trained <- read_csv("popovtrained3v1.csv")
popov20193v1trained <- subset(popov20193v1trained , popov20193v1trained$padj<0.05)
popov20193v1trained <- popov20193v1trained$...1

popov2019 <- c(popov20192v1untrained, popov20193v1untrained, popov20192v1trained, popov20193v1trained)
popov2019 <- unique(popov2019)

popov2019genes <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                  filters = "external_gene_name",
                  values = popov2019,
                  mart = mart)
popov2019 <- popov2019genes$ensembl_gene_id

#Reitzner et al. 2024
reitzner2024 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/Reitzner2024.xlsx")
reitzner2024 <- reitzner2024 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(factor2 == "EE") %>%
  dplyr::filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::filter(comparison %in% c("preVS1h", "preVSpost", "preVS3h"))
reitzner2024 <- unique(reitzner2024$geneID)

#Pillon et al. 2020: Acute aerobic exercise, all DEG with padj <0.05
pillon2020 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/pillon2020.xlsx")
pillon2020 <- subset(pillon2020, pillon2020$adj.pval_AA<0.05)
pillon2020 <- pillon2020$X1

pillon2020genes <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                  filters = "external_gene_name",
                  values = pillon2020,
                  mart = mart)
pillon2020 <- pillon2020genes$ensembl_gene_id

#rubenstein DESeq2 FDR 5%
rubensteinraw <- as.data.frame(read_tsv("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/GSE151066_raw_counts_GRCh38.p13_NCBI.tsv"))
rubensteininfo <- read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/rubensteinsampleids.xlsx")

entrez_ids <- as.character(rubensteinraw$GeneID)

gene_ensembl <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = entrez_ids, 
                       column = "ENSEMBL", keytype = "ENTREZID", 
                       multiVals = "first")

rubensteinraw$ensembl <- gene_ensembl 
rubensteinraw <- rubensteinraw[!is.na(rubensteinraw$ensembl) & rubensteinraw$ensembl != "", ]

rubensteinraw <- rubensteinraw[, -1, drop = FALSE] 

rubensteininfo <- rubensteininfo %>% distinct()

rubensteininfo <- rubensteininfo[order(rubensteininfo$sampleid), ]
rubensteinraw <- rubensteinraw[, order(colnames(rubensteinraw))]

rubensteinraw$ensembl <- make.unique(rubensteinraw$ensembl)

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = rubensteinraw,
  colData = rubensteininfo,
  design = ~0 + timepoint + sex + fitness,
  tidy=TRUE
)

dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds)

dds <- DESeq(dds)

POSTvsPREruben <- as.data.frame(DESeq2::results(dds, contrast = c("timepoint", "POST", "PRE")))
POSTvsPREruben <- POSTvsPREruben %>% dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
POSTvsPREruben$ensembl <- rownames(POSTvsPREruben)
POSTvsPREruben$ensembl <- sub("\\..*", "", POSTvsPREruben$ensembl)
POSTvsPREruben <- POSTvsPREruben$ensembl

H3vsPREruben <- as.data.frame(DESeq2::results(dds, contrast = c("timepoint", "threeH", "PRE")))
H3vsPREruben$ensembl <- rownames(H3vsPREruben)
H3vsPREruben$ensembl <- sub("\\..*", "", H3vsPREruben$ensembl)
H3vsPREruben <- H3vsPREruben %>% dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
H3vsPREruben <- H3vsPREruben$ensembl

rubenstein2022 <- unique(c(H3vsPREruben, POSTvsPREruben))

#Amar et al. 2021: all DEGs impacted by time (FDR of 1% - no total list of genes provided) Meta
amar2021 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/amar2021.xlsx")
amar2021 <- amar2021[grepl('Time-linear|Time-Q', amar2021$Group), ]
amar2021 <- unique(amar2021$Entrez)

amar2021genes <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                  filters = "external_gene_name",
                  values = amar2021,
                  mart = mart)
amar2021 <- amar2021genes $ensembl_gene_id

#Dickinson et al. 2018: PRE vs 1H and 4H (Aerobic exercise cohort) FDR 5% and FC 0.58
dickinsonraw <- as.data.frame(read_tsv("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/countsdickinson.tsv"))
dickinsoninfo <- t(read.table("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/dickinsonannotations.txt", sep = "\t", header = FALSE))
colnames(dickinsoninfo) <- gsub("^!", "", as.character(dickinsoninfo[1, ]))
dickinsoninfo <- as.data.frame(dickinsoninfo[-1, ])

colnames(dickinsoninfo) <- make.unique(colnames(dickinsoninfo))

dickinsoninfo <- dickinsoninfo %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = case_when(
      grepl("Baseline", Sample_title) ~ "PRE",
      grepl("_1h_", Sample_title) ~ "H1",
      grepl("_4h_", Sample_title) ~ "H4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_ 
    ),
    Exercise = case_when(
      grepl("AE", Sample_title) ~ "Aerobic",
      grepl("RE", Sample_title) ~ "Resistance",
      grepl("Baseline", Sample_title) ~ "Aerobic",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_  
    ),
    SampleID = sub(".*_(\\d+)$", "\\1", Sample_title)
  )

dickinsoninfo <- dickinsoninfo %>% dplyr::filter(Exercise == "Aerobic")

entrez_ids <- as.character(dickinsonraw$GeneID)

gene_ensembl <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = entrez_ids, 
                       column = "ENSEMBL", keytype = "ENTREZID", 
                       multiVals = "first")

dickinsonraw$ensembl <- gene_ensembl 
dickinsonraw<- dickinsonraw[!is.na(dickinsonraw$ensembl) & dickinsonraw$ensembl != "", ]

dickinsonraw$ensembl <- make.unique(dickinsonraw$ensembl)

dickinsonraw <- dickinsonraw[, c("ensembl", colnames(dickinsonraw)[colnames(dickinsonraw) %in% dickinsoninfo$Sample_geo_accession])]

colnames(dickinsonraw) <- NULL

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = dickinsonraw,
  colData = dickinsoninfo,
  design = ~0 + Timepoint + SampleID,
  tidy=TRUE
)

dds <- estimateSizeFactors(dds)

dds <- DESeq(dds)

H1vsPREdickinson <- as.data.frame(DESeq2::results(dds, contrast = c("Timepoint", "H1", "PRE")))
H1vsPREdickinson <- H1vsPREdickinson %>% dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
H1vsPREdickinson$ensembl <- rownames(H1vsPREdickinson)
H1vsPREdickinson$ensembl <- sub("\\..*", "", H1vsPREdickinson$ensembl)
H1vsPREdickinson <- H1vsPREdickinson$ensembl

H4vsPREdickinson <- as.data.frame(DESeq2::results(dds, contrast = c("Timepoint", "H4", "PRE")))
H4vsPREdickinson <- H4vsPREdickinson %>% dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
H4vsPREdickinson$ensembl <- rownames(H4vsPREdickinson)
H4vsPREdickinson$ensembl <- sub("\\..*", "", H4vsPREdickinson$ensembl)
H4vsPREdickinson <- H4vsPREdickinson$ensembl

dickinson2018 <- unique(c(H4vsPREdickinson, H1vsPREdickinson))

#Runqvist et al. 2019, FDR 10% and FC 1.2
rundqvist2019 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/rundqvist2019.xlsx")
rundqvist2019 <- rundqvist2019 %>%
  distinct(Symbol, .keep_all = TRUE)

rundqvist2019genes <- getBM(attributes = c("external_gene_name", "ensembl_gene_id"),
                 filters = "external_gene_name",
                 values = rundqvist2019$Symbol,
                 mart = mart)

rundqvist2019 <- rundqvist2019genes$ensembl_gene_id

#Moore et al. 2023: 5% FDR using overweight and normal BMI pops. (men) RNAseq
moore2023 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/all moore 2023.xlsx")
moore2023 <- moore2023 %>%
  distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)
moore2023check <- checkGeneSymbols(moore2023$gene, chromosome = NULL, map = NULL,
                  species = "human", expand.ambiguous = FALSE)

moore2023genes <- getBM(attributes = c("external_gene_name", "ensembl_gene_id"),
                  filters = "external_gene_name",
                  values = moore2023check$Suggested.Symbol,
                  mart = mart)

moore2023 <- moore2023genes$ensembl_gene_id

#Norrbom et al. 2022 5% FDR using healthy moderately trained (men) RNAseq
norrbom2022 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("data/Previousstudies/exerciseresponse/norrbom2022.xlsx")
norrbom2022firstbout <- subset(norrbom2022, norrbom2022$First.bout.of.exercise.adj.P.Val < 0.05)
norrbom2022secondbout <- subset(norrbom2022, norrbom2022$Nineth.bout.of.exercise.adj.P.Val < 0.05)
norrbom2022 <- unique(c(norrbom2022firstbout$ensembl_gene_id, norrbom2022secondbout$ensembl_gene_id))

#This study
taylor2024 <- allDEGs

exercisestudies <- list(
"Rundqvist et al. 2019" = rundqvist2019,
"Norrbom et al. 2022" = norrbom2022,
"Rubenstein et al. 2022" = rubenstein2022,
"Moore et al. 2023" = moore2023,
"Reitzner et al. 2024" = reitzner2024,
"Taylor et al. 2025" = taylor2024)

df1 <- stack(exercisestudies)

df1 <- df1 %>%
  group_by(ind, values) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  spread(ind, n, fill = 0)

colnames(df1) <- c("gene", "Rundqvist et al. 2019", "Norrbom et al. 2022", "Rubenstein et al. 2022", "Moore et al. 2023", "Reitzner et al. 2024", "Taylor et al. 2025")

ordered_sets <- c("Rundqvist et al. 2019", "Norrbom et al. 2022", "Rubenstein et al. 2022", "Moore et al. 2023", "Reitzner et al. 2024", "Taylor et al. 2025")

ComplexUpset::upset(
  data = df1,
  intersect = ordered_sets,
  base_annotations=list(
        'Overlapping genes'=intersection_size(
          counts = TRUE) +
           ylim(c(0, 8000)) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
        ),
  matrix=(
        intersection_matrix(
            geom=geom_point(
                shape=21,
                size=2.75
            ),
            segment=geom_segment(
                linetype='blank',
                color = "black"
            ))),
  queries = list(
   upset_query(
      set = 'Norrbom et al. 2022',
      color = "#9c9c9c",
      fill = "#9c9c9c"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = 'Taylor et al. 2025',
      color = "#9c9c9c",
      fill = "#9c9c9c"
    ),
   upset_query(
      set = 'Reitzner et al. 2024',
      color = "#e8e6e6",
      fill = "#e8e6e6"
    ),
   upset_query(
      set = 'Moore et al. 2023',
      color = "#e8e6e6",
      fill = "#e8e6e6"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = 'Rubenstein et al. 2022',
      color = "#e8e6e6",
      fill = "#e8e6e6"
    ),
   upset_query(
      set = 'Rundqvist et al. 2019',
      color = "black",
      fill = "black"
    )
  ),
  sort_sets=FALSE,
  min_size=200,
  set_sizes=(
        upset_set_size() +
        geom_text(aes(label=..count..), hjust=1.1, size = 3, stat='count')
        + ylab('No. DEGs') +
        ylim(c(30000, 0))),
  name = NULL,
  keep_empty_groups=TRUE,
  stripes=c('white'),
  themes=upset_modify_themes(
        list(
            'intersections_matrix'=theme(text = element_text(size = 12)),
            'overall_sizes'=theme(axis.text.x=element_blank())) +
            theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
       
    )
  )

export::graph2doc(file="Previous studies overlap.docx", width=5.25,height=3.25)

grid.newpage()

colorsintensity <- c("black", "#9c9c9c", "#e8e6e6")
labels <- c( "Sprint interval exercise",
             "High-intensity interval exercise",
             "Moderate-intensity continous exercise")
grid.legend(labels = labels, pch = 22, gp = gpar(fill = colorsintensity, col = NA, fontfamily = "sans", fontsize = 16))
    
export::graph2doc(file="Previous studies overlap label.docx", width=5,height=2)

allprevious <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype"),
                     filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                     values = df1$gene,
                     mart = mart)

df1 <- merge(df1, allprevious[, c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype")],
             by.x = "gene", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)

df1 <- df1 %>% 
  mutate(gene_biotype = recode(gene_biotype,
                               "Mt_rRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "Mt_tRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TR_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "TR_V_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_V_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "sRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "scaRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snoRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "misc_RNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "miRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "protein_coding" = "Protein coding",
                               "unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "ribozyme" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TEC" = "Unassigned",
                               "artifact" = "Unassigned",
                               .default = gene_biotype)) %>%
  mutate(gene_biotype = ifelse(is.na(gene_biotype) | gene_biotype == "", "Unassigned", gene_biotype))

df1 <- df1 %>%
  mutate(gene_biotype = ifelse(is.na(gene_biotype), "Unassigned", gene_biotype))

df1 <- df1 %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.character)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(combo = paste0(c_across(-c(gene, gene_biotype)), collapse = "")) %>%
  ungroup()

combo_total_counts <- df1 %>%
  group_by(combo, gene_biotype) %>%
  summarize(total_count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

valid_combos <- combo_total_counts %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarise(Totalcombo = sum(total_count)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Totalcombo > 199) %>%
  pull(combo)

combo_counts <- df1 %>%
  dplyr::filter(combo %in% valid_combos) %>%
  group_by(combo, gene_biotype) %>%
  summarize(n = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

combo_total_counts <- combo_counts %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarize(total_n = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_n))

combo_counts <- combo_counts %>%
  mutate(combo = factor(combo, levels = combo_total_counts$combo))

genotypecolour <- c(
  "lncRNA" = "#E6F5C9", 
  "Other ncRNA" = "#b3e2cd", 
  "Protein coding" = "#93b7fa", 
  "Pseudogene" = "#FFF2AE", 
  "Unassigned" = "#FDCDAC")

combo_counts$gene_biotype <- factor(combo_counts$gene_biotype,
                                       levels = c("Protein coding",
                                                  "lncRNA",
                                                  "Other ncRNA",
                                                  "Pseudogene",
                                                  "Unassigned"))

countssumabs <- combo_counts %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarise(SumAbsGenes = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    label_size = ifelse(combo == "000001", 3.5, 2.75),
    label_face = ifelse(combo == "000001", "bold", "plain")
  )

ggplot(combo_counts, aes(x = combo, y = n, fill = gene_biotype)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Overlapping genes",
       fill = str_wrap("Gene biotype", width = 25)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), 
                     limits = c(0, 8500), 
                     breaks = seq(1000, 8000, by = 1000)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = genotypecolour) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 50, b = 10, l = 10)) +
  geom_text(
    data = countssumabs,
    aes(
      x = combo,
      y = SumAbsGenes,
      label = abs(SumAbsGenes),
      size = label_size,
      fontface = label_face
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = -0.2,
    hjust = -0.1,
    angle = 55,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  scale_size_identity()

export::graph2doc(file="Previous studies overlap2.docx", width=5.5,height=3.75)

previous_genes <- unique(c(rubenstein2022, rundqvist2019, pillon2020, amar2021, moore2023, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, reitzner2024))

previous_genes  <- gsub("\\..*", "", previous_genes)

notdetectedintaylor <- as.data.frame(setdiff(previous_genes, taylor2024))
oldgenes <- intersect(taylor2024, previous_genes)
newgenes <- setdiff(taylor2024, previous_genes)

```

#Identifying what genes are only differentially expressed within single studies (Fig 1c)
```{r}
all_DE_genes <- c(rubenstein2022, rundqvist2019, pillon2020, amar2021, moore2023, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, reitzner2024, taylor2024)

EXCLUDEREITZ <- c(rubenstein2022, rundqvist2019, pillon2020, amar2021, moore2023, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, taylor2024)

onlydetectedreitzner <- setdiff(reitzner2024, EXCLUDEREITZ)

correlatedreitzner <- enrichGO(onlydetectedreitzner , OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatedreitzner <- as.data.frame(correlatedreitzner@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "Reitzner et al.")

EXCLUDEMOORE <- c(rubenstein2022, rundqvist2019, pillon2020, amar2021, reitzner2024, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, taylor2024)

onlydetectedmoore <- setdiff(moore2023, EXCLUDEMOORE)

correlatedmoore <- enrichGO(onlydetectedmoore, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatedmoore <- as.data.frame(correlatedmoore@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% 
                    mutate(Study = "Moore et al.")

EXCLUDERUNDQVIST <- c(rubenstein2022, moore2023, pillon2020, amar2021, reitzner2024, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, taylor2024)

onlydetectedrundqvist <- setdiff(rundqvist2019, EXCLUDERUNDQVIST)

correlatedrundqvist <- enrichGO(onlydetectedrundqvist, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatedrundqvist<- as.data.frame(correlatedrundqvist@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% 
                      mutate(Study = "Rundqvist et al.")

EXCLUDEtaylor <- c(rubenstein2022, moore2023, pillon2020, amar2021, reitzner2024, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, norrbom2022, rundqvist2019)

onlydetectedtaylor <- setdiff(taylor2024, EXCLUDEtaylor)

correlatedtaylor <- enrichGO(onlydetectedtaylor, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatedtaylor<- as.data.frame(correlatedtaylor@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>%
                    mutate(Study = "Taylor et al.")


EXCLUDEnorrbom <- c(rubenstein2022, moore2023, pillon2020, amar2021, reitzner2024, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, taylor2024, rundqvist2019)

onlydetectednorrbom <- setdiff(norrbom2022, EXCLUDEnorrbom)

correlatedNorrbom <- enrichGO(onlydetectednorrbom, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatednorrbom<- as.data.frame(correlatedNorrbom@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% 
                    mutate(Study = "Norrbom et al.")

EXCLUDErubenstein <- c(norrbom2022, moore2023, pillon2020, amar2021, reitzner2024, popov2018, popov2019, dickinson2018, taylor2024, rundqvist2019)

onlydetectedrubenstein <- setdiff(rubenstein2022, EXCLUDErubenstein)

correlatedrubenstein <- enrichGO(onlydetectedrubenstein, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=all_DE_genes, keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

correlatedrubenstein<- as.data.frame(correlatedrubenstein@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% mutate(Study = "Rubenstein et al.")

excludedgenes <- rbind(correlatedtaylor, correlatedmoore, correlatedreitzner, correlatednorrbom, correlatedrubenstein, correlatedrundqvist)

excludedgenes <- excludedgenes %>%
  mutate(Description = if_else(
    str_starts(Description, "rRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "ncRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "RNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "tRNA") |  
    str_starts(Description, "DNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "mRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "protein-RNA") |
    str_starts(Description, "miRNA"),
     Description,
    str_replace(Description, "^([a-z])(.*)", function(x) {
      paste0(toupper(substr(x, 1, 1)), substr(x, 2, nchar(x)))
    })
  ))

excludedgenes_filtered <- excludedgenes

excludedgenes <- excludedgenes %>% dplyr::filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

excludedgene_values <- c("Ribosome assembly",
                         "Cytoplasmic translation",
                         "Protein targeting",
                         "Endoplasmic reticulum organisation",
                         "Mitochondrial gene expression",
                         "Oxidative phosphorylation",
                         "Mitochondrial translation",
                         "Regulation of proteasomal protein catabolic process",
                         "Chronic inflammatory response",
                         "Adaptive immune response",
                         "Sensory perception of chemical stimulus",
                         "Positive regulation of cell division")

excludedgenes_filtered$Description[excludedgenes_filtered$Description == "Endoplasmic reticulum organization"] <- "Endoplasmic reticulum organisation"

excludedgenes_filtered <- excludedgenes_filtered %>% dplyr::filter(Description %in% excludedgene_values)

excludedgenes_filtered$Description <- factor(excludedgenes_filtered$Description, 
  levels = c("Ribosome assembly",
                         "Cytoplasmic translation",
                         "Protein targeting",
                         "Endoplasmic reticulum organisation",
                         "Mitochondrial gene expression",
                         "Oxidative phosphorylation",
                         "Mitochondrial translation",
                         "Regulation of proteasomal protein catabolic process",
                         "Chronic inflammatory response",
                         "Adaptive immune response",
                         "Sensory perception of chemical stimulus",
                         "Positive regulation of cell division"),
  ordered = TRUE)

excludedgenes_filtered$Description <- fct_rev(excludedgenes_filtered$Description)

excludedgenes_filtered$Study <- factor(excludedgenes_filtered$Study, levels = c("Taylor et al.", "Reitzner et al.", "Moore et al.", "Rubenstein et al.", "Norrbom et al.", "Rundqvist et al."), ordered = TRUE)

ggplot(excludedgenes_filtered, aes(x = Study, y = Description, size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of genes",
                        range = c(0.5, 7),
                        breaks = c(10, 25, 50, 100), 
                        labels = c("10", "25", "50", "100")) +
  scale_color_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value",
                        colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05),
                        breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y=NULL) +
  ggtitle(str_wrap("Single study DEGs", width=40)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, size = 8, face="bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
        legend.title.align = 0.5,
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, "cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 1)),
         color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top"))

export::graph2doc(file="singlestudyDEGs.docx", width=6.75,height=4)
```

#Effect of no. participants on DEGs (Fig 1d)
```{r}
sample_ids <- unique(sampleid)

mart <- useEnsembl(biomart = "genes", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

perform_differential_analysis <- function(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations, num_participants) {
  
  deg_list <- vector("list", num_iterations)
  
  for (i in 1:num_iterations) {
    sample_ids <- unique(y$samples$sampleid)
    selected_sample_ids <- sample(sample_ids, num_participants, replace = FALSE)
    selected_sample_ids <- sort(selected_sample_ids) 
    
    y_subset <- y[, y$samples$sampleid %in% selected_sample_ids]
    design_subset <- design[y$samples$sampleid %in% selected_sample_ids, ]
    
    filtered_sampleids <- as.character(y$samples$sampleid)
    filtered_col <- which(filtered_sampleids %in% selected_sample_ids)
    logical_index <- filtered_sampleids %in% selected_sample_ids
    filtered_sampleids <-  filtered_sampleids[logical_index]
    counts_subset <- counts[, filtered_col]
    
    fitn <- voomLmFit(y_subset, design = design_subset, block = filtered_sampleids, keep.EList = TRUE, plot = FALSE, save.plot = FALSE)
    fitn <- contrasts.fit(fitn, contrasts=contr.matrix)
    efitn <- eBayes(fitn)
    
    top_treat <- function(coef, efitn) {
      resultn <- topTreat(efitn, coef = coef, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
      resultn <- subset(resultn, adj.P.Val < 0.05)
      return(resultn)
    }
    
    MIDvsPRE <- top_treat(1, efitn)
    POSTvsPRE <- top_treat(2, efitn)
    H3vsPRE <- top_treat(3, efitn)
    H6vsPRE <- top_treat(4, efitn)
    H9vsPRE <- top_treat(5, efitn)
    H12vsPRE <- top_treat(6, efitn)
    H24vsPRE <- top_treat(7, efitn)
    H48vsPRE <- top_treat(8, efitn)
    
    totalDEGs <- topTable(efitn, n=Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
    totalDEGs <- subset(totalDEGs, totalDEGs$adj.P.Val<0.05)
    
    ensemblids <- unique(c(rownames(MIDvsPRE), rownames(POSTvsPRE), rownames(H3vsPRE), 
                           rownames(H6vsPRE), rownames(H9vsPRE), rownames(H12vsPRE), 
                           rownames(H24vsPRE), rownames(H48vsPRE), rownames(totalDEGs)))
    
    biotype_info <- getBM(mart = mart,
                          attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype"),
                          filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                          values = ensemblids,
                          uniqueRows = TRUE)
     
    biotype_info <- biotype_info %>% 
                      mutate(gene_biotype = recode(gene_biotype,
                               "Mt_rRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "Mt_tRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TR_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "TR_V_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_V_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "scaRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snoRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "misc_RNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "miRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "protein_coding" = "Protein coding",
                               "unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "ribozyme" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TEC" = "Unassigned",
                               "artifact" = "Unassigned",
                                .default = gene_biotype)) %>%
                      mutate(gene_biotype = ifelse(is.na(gene_biotype) | gene_biotype == "", "Unassigned", gene_biotype))
    
    merge_biotype <- function(deg_list, biotype_info) {
    deg_list$GENE <- rownames(deg_list)
    merged_result <- merge(deg_list, biotype_info, by.x = "GENE", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
    rownames(merged_result) <- merged_result$GENE
    merged_result$GENE <- NULL
    merged_result$gene_biotype <- ifelse(is.na(merged_result$gene_biotype), "Unassigned", merged_result$gene_biotype)
    return(merged_result)
    }
    
    MIDvsPRE <- merge_biotype(MIDvsPRE, biotype_info)
    POSTvsPRE <- merge_biotype(POSTvsPRE, biotype_info)
    H3vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H3vsPRE, biotype_info)
    H6vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H6vsPRE, biotype_info)
    H9vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H9vsPRE, biotype_info)
    H12vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H12vsPRE, biotype_info)
    H24vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H24vsPRE, biotype_info)
    H48vsPRE <- merge_biotype(H48vsPRE, biotype_info)
    totalDEGs <- merge_biotype(totalDEGs, biotype_info)
    
    summarize_by_biotype <- function(deg_data, timepoint) {
      biotype_summary <- deg_data %>%
        group_by(gene_biotype) %>%
        summarize(DEG_Counts = n()) %>%
        mutate(Time = timepoint)
      return(biotype_summary)
    }
    
    MID_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(MIDvsPRE, "MID")
    POST_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(POSTvsPRE, "POST")
    H3_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H3vsPRE, "3H")
    H6_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H6vsPRE, "6H")
    H9_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H9vsPRE, "9H")
    H12_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H12vsPRE, "12H")
    H24_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H24vsPRE, "24H")
    H48_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(H48vsPRE, "48H")
    Total_summary <- summarize_by_biotype(totalDEGs, "Total")
    
    iteration_summary <- rbind(MID_summary, POST_summary, H3_summary, H6_summary, 
                               H9_summary, H12_summary, H24_summary, H48_summary, Total_summary)
    
    deg_list[[i]] <- iteration_summary
  }
  
  all_deg_counts <- do.call(rbind, deg_list)
  
  summary_stats <- all_deg_counts %>%
    group_by(gene_biotype, Time) %>%
    summarize(Average = round(mean(DEG_Counts)),
              SD = round(sd(DEG_Counts)))
  
  return(summary_stats)
}

n5p <- perform_differential_analysis(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations = 100, num_participants = 5)
n5p <- n5p %>% mutate(participants = "5", iterations = "100")
n10p <- perform_differential_analysis(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations = 100, num_participants = 10)
n10p <- n10p %>% mutate(participants = "10", iterations = "100")
n20p <- perform_differential_analysis(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations = 100, num_participants = 20)
n20p <- n20p %>% mutate(participants = "20", iterations = "100")
n30p <- perform_differential_analysis(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations = 100, num_participants = 30)
n30p <- n30p %>% mutate(participants = "30", iterations = "100")
n40p <- perform_differential_analysis(y, design, counts, contr.matrix, num_iterations = 1, num_participants = 40)
n40p <- n40p %>% mutate(participants = "40", iterations = "1")

DEGparticipants <- rbind(n5p, n10p, n20p, n30p, n40p)

DEGparticipants$Time <- factor(DEGparticipants$Time,
                                       levels = c("MID", "POST", "3H", "6H", "9H", "12H", "24H", "48H", "Total"))

DEGparticipants$gene_biotype <- factor(DEGparticipants$gene_biotype,
                                       levels = c("Protein coding", "lncRNA", "Other ncRNA", "Pseudogene", "Unassigned"))

DEGparticipants$participants <- factor(DEGparticipants$participants,
                                       levels = unique(DEGparticipants$participants))
genotypecolour <- c(
  "lncRNA" = "#E6F5C9", 
  "Other ncRNA" = "#b3e2cd", 
  "Protein coding" = "#93b7fa", 
  "Pseudogene" = "#FFF2AE", 
  "Unassigned" = "#FDCDAC")

DEGparticipants <- DEGparticipants %>% dplyr::filter(Time == "Total")%>%
        dplyr::filter(Time == "Total") %>%
        dplyr::arrange(rev(gene_biotype)) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(participants) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(cum_height = cumsum(Average))

ggplot(data = DEGparticipants, aes(x = participants, y = Average, fill = gene_biotype)) + 
  geom_col(position = "stack", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=cum_height, ymax=cum_height + SD,
                    group = gene_biotype, 
                    colour = gene_biotype),
                      size = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = genotypecolour) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = genotypecolour) +
  labs(x = "No. participants", y = "No. DEGs", fill = "Gene biotype") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
                     limits = c(0,18000),
                     breaks = seq(0, 18000, by = 3000)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1)) +
  ggtitle("Effect of participant number") +
  guides(colour = "none")

export::graph2doc(file="participantnumber.docx", width=5,height=4.5)
```

#no. DE genes at each time point and proportion previously reported as exercise-induced (Fig 2a)
```{r}
overlap_genes <- list(
  MID = rownames(MIDvsPRE),
  POST = rownames(POSTvsPRE),
  H3 = rownames(H3vsPRE),
  H6 = rownames(H6vsPRE),
  H9 = rownames(H9vsPRE),
  H12 = rownames(H12vsPRE),
  H24 = rownames(H24vsPRE),
  H48 = rownames(H48vsPRE))

all_genes <- unlist(overlap_genes)
unique_genes <- unique(all_genes)

process_DE_genes <- function(data, time_point, previous_genes) {
  
  DE_down <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
  meanlogFCdown <- as.numeric(mean(DE_down$logFC))
  sdlogFCdown <-  as.numeric(sd(DE_down$logFC))
  DE_down <- rownames(DE_down)
  
  DE_down_previous <- intersect(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_previous <- length(DE_down_previous)
  DE_down_previous <- DE_down_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point,
           Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCdown) %>% cbind(sdlogFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction",
                                  "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  DE_down_previous$Genes <- -DE_down_previous$Genes
  
  DE_down_new <- setdiff(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_new <- length(DE_down_new)
  DE_down_new <- DE_down_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCdown) %>% cbind(sdlogFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction",
                             "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  DE_down_new$Genes <- -DE_down_new$Genes
  
  DE_up <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
  meanlogFCup <- as.numeric(mean(DE_up$logFC))
  sdlogFCup <-  as.numeric(sd(DE_up$logFC))
  DE_up <- rownames(DE_up)
  
  DE_up_previous <- intersect(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_previous <- length(DE_up_previous)
  DE_up_previous <- DE_up_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point,
           Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCup) %>% cbind(sdlogFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction",
                                "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  
  DE_up_new <- setdiff(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_new <- length(DE_up_new)
  DE_up_new <- DE_up_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCup) %>% cbind(sdlogFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction",
                           "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  
  DE_data <- rbind(DE_down_previous, DE_up_previous, DE_down_new, DE_up_new)
  return(DE_data)
}

TotalDE1 <- process_DE_genes(MIDvsPRE, "MID", previous_genes)
TotalDE2 <- process_DE_genes(POSTvsPRE, "+0 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE3 <- process_DE_genes(H3vsPRE, "+3 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE4 <- process_DE_genes(H6vsPRE, "+6 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE5 <- process_DE_genes(H9vsPRE, "+9 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE6 <- process_DE_genes(H12vsPRE, "+12 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE7 <- process_DE_genes(H24vsPRE, "+24 h", previous_genes)
TotalDE8 <- process_DE_genes(H48vsPRE, "+48 h", previous_genes)

TotalDE <- rbind (TotalDE1, TotalDE2, TotalDE3, TotalDE4, TotalDE5, TotalDE6, TotalDE7, TotalDE8)

TotalDE$Time <- as.character(TotalDE$Time)
TotalDE$Time <- factor(TotalDE$Time, levels = unique(TotalDE$Time))

TotalDE <- TotalDE %>%
  mutate(Time_Direction = paste(Time, Direction, sep = "_"))

TotalDEsumabs <- TotalDE %>%
  group_by(Time, Direction) %>%
  summarise(SumAbsGenes = sum(Genes), .groups = "drop")
  
timecoloursandregulation <- c("MID" = "#FF7F00", "+0 h" = "#FFFF33", "+3 h" = "#9ef576", "+6 h" = "#3b8739", "+9 h" = "#34ebe8", "+12 h" = "#3a09d9", "+24 h" = "#a957b5","+48 h" = "#A65628", "Up" = "#e5cdd3", "Down" = "#ced8e3")

ggplot(data = TotalDE, aes(x = Time, y = Genes, fill = Time, pattern = Previous)) +
  geom_rect(xmin = 0, xmax = 9,
              ymin = 0, ymax = 8000, size = 1,
              fill = "#e5cdd3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_rect(xmin = 0, xmax = 9,
              ymin = -8000, ymax = 0, size = 1,
              fill = "#ced8e3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_col_pattern(color = "black", 
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "No. DEGs relative to PRE", fill = "Direction",
       pattern = str_wrap("Previously reported as exercise-induced DEG", width = 25)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = timecoloursandregulation) + 
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Never" = "none", "Previously reported" = "stripe"),
                       labels = c("Previously reported" = "Yes", "Never" = "No")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("        No. DEGs relative to PRE\n \n Upregulated        Downregulated"), 
                    labels = function(x) abs(x),
                    limits = c(-7000, 7000),
                    breaks = seq(-7000, 7000, by = 1000),
                    position="right") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 5, l = 5), size = 12),
        axis.title.y.right = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 5, r =20)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
    ggtitle("Exercise-induced DEGs") +
    guides( 
    fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, override.aes = list(fill = "white"))) +
  geom_text(data = TotalDEsumabs, aes(x = Time, y = SumAbsGenes, label = abs(SumAbsGenes)),
            inherit.aes=FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(TotalDEsumabs$SumAbsGenes > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 2.75, colour = "black")

export::graph2doc(file="DEGstimecourse.docx", width=3.75,height=3.25)
```

#Ridge plot of the magnitude of differential expression (Fig 2b)
```{r}
top_treat <- function(coef, efit) {
    result <- topTreat(efit, coef = coef, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
    result <- subset(result, result$adj.P.Val < 0.05)
    return(result)
  }
  
MIDvsPRE <- top_treat(1, efit)
POSTvsPRE <- top_treat(2, efit)
H3vsPRE <- top_treat(3, efit)
H6vsPRE <- top_treat(4, efit)
H9vsPRE <- top_treat(5, efit)
H12vsPRE <- top_treat(6, efit)
H24vsPRE <- top_treat(7, efit)
H48vsPRE <- top_treat(8, efit)

add_time <- function(data, time) {
  data <- data %>% mutate(Time = time)
  
  return(data)
}

MIDvsPREridge <- add_time(MIDvsPRE, "MID")
POSTvsPREridge <- add_time(POSTvsPRE, "+0 h")
H3vsPREridge <- add_time(H3vsPRE, "+3 h")
H6vsPREridge <- add_time(H6vsPRE,  "+6 h")
H9vsPREridge <- add_time(H9vsPRE, "+9 h")
H12vsPREridge <- add_time(H12vsPRE,  "+12 h")
H24vsPREridge <- add_time(H24vsPRE,  "+24 h")
H48vsPREridge <- add_time(H48vsPRE,  "+48 h")

combined_data <- bind_rows(MIDvsPREridge, POSTvsPREridge, 
                           H3vsPREridge,  H6vsPREridge, 
                           H9vsPREridge, H12vsPREridge,
                           H24vsPREridge, H48vsPREridge)

time_order <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")

combined_data$Time <- factor(combined_data$Time, levels = time_order, ordered = TRUE)

time_background <- strip_nested(
  text_y = elem_list_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
  background_y = elem_list_rect(
    fill = c(
        "MID" = "#FF7F00", 
        "POST" = "#FFFF33", 
        "3H" = "#9ef576", 
        "6H" = "#3b8739", 
        "9H" = "#34ebe8", 
        "12H" = "#3a09d9", 
        "24H" = "#a957b5", 
        "48h" = "#A65628")))

ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = logFC, fill = Time)) +
  geom_rect(xmin = 0, xmax = 5,
            ymin = 0, ymax = 2, size = 1,
            fill = "#e5cdd3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_rect(xmin = -2.5, xmax = 0,
            ymin = 0, ymax = 2, size = 1,
            fill = "#ced8e3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_density(aes(y = after_stat(density)), 
               stat = "density", 
               position = "identity", 
               show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = timecoloursandregulation) +
  labs(
    x = bquote(Log[2] * FC ~ "relative to PRE"), 
    y = bquote("Density")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24, vjust = 3, angle = 90),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.6),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  ggtitle("Magnitude of differential expression") +
  facet_nested(
    Time ~ ., 
    scales = "free_y", 
    switch = "y", 
    strip = time_background
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-2, 4, by = 1),
    limits = c(-2, 4)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.5, by = 0.5),
    limits = c(0, 1.75)
  )

graph2doc(file="ridgeplot.docx", width=8,height=6)
```

#Unsupervised hierarchical clustering to create the heatmap of all DEGs (Fig 2c)
```{r}
dendrowgraph <- rna_comp[c(1:8)] %>% dist(method = "euclidean") %>%
  hclust(method = "average") %>% as.dendrogram

col <- colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("#0A3C72", "white", "#7B0722"))

time_palette_custom2label <- c(
  "MIDvsPRE" = "#FF7F00", 
  "POSTvsPRE" = "#FFFF33", 
  "H3vsPRE" = "#9ef576", 
  "H6vsPRE" = "#3b8739", 
  "H9vsPRE" = "#34ebe8", 
  "H12vsPRE" = "#3a09d9", 
  "H24vsPRE" = "#a957b5", 
  "H48vsPRE" = "#A65628"
)

labelsHM <- expression(Log[2]*FC ~ "relative to PRE")

column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = data.frame(
    Time = factor(colnames(rna_comp)[1:8], levels = names(time_palette_custom2label))
  ),
  col = list(Time = time_palette_custom2label),
  show_legend = FALSE,
  show_annotation_name = FALSE)

heatmap <- Heatmap(
  as.matrix(rna_comp[c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8)]), 
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = labelsHM, 
    legend_width = unit(3.6, "cm"),
    legend_direction = "horizontal"
  ),
  col = col, 
  cluster_rows = dendrowgraph, 
  show_column_dend = TRUE,
  show_row_names = FALSE, 
  show_row_dend = FALSE, 
  cluster_columns = FALSE, 
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
  column_labels = c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h"),
  column_names_rot = 45,
  top_annotation = column_annotation
)

draw(heatmap, heatmap_legend_side = "bottom")

export::graph2doc(file="heatmap.docx", width=3,height=6)
```

#Overlap plot for exercise-induced DEGs at each time point (Fig 2d)
```{r}
overlapdirection_genes <- list(
  MIDup = rownames(MIDvsPREup),
  POSTup = rownames(POSTvsPREup),
  H3up = rownames(H3vsPREup),
  H6up = rownames(H6vsPREup),
  H9up = rownames(H9vsPREup),
  H12up = rownames(H12vsPREup),
  H24up = rownames(H24vsPREup),
  H48up = rownames(H48vsPREup),
  MIDdown = rownames(MIDvsPREdown),
  POSTdown = rownames(POSTvsPREdown),
  H3down = rownames(H3vsPREdown),
  H6down = rownames(H6vsPREdown),
  H9down = rownames(H9vsPREdown),
  H12down = rownames(H12vsPREdown),
  H24down = rownames(H24vsPREdown),
  H48down = rownames(H48vsPREdown))

df2 <- stack(overlapdirection_genes)
df2 <- df2 %>%
  group_by(ind, values) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  spread(ind, n, fill = 0)

colnames(df2) = c("gene", "MID UP", "POST UP", "3H UP", "6H UP", "9H UP", "12H UP", "24H UP", "48H UP", "MID DOWN", "POST DOWN", "3H DOWN", "6H DOWN", "9H DOWN", "12H DOWN", "24H DOWN", "48H DOWN")

ordered_sets <- c(
  "48H UP", "24H UP", "12H UP", "9H UP", "6H UP", "3H UP", "POST UP", "MID UP",
  "MID DOWN", "POST DOWN", "3H DOWN", "6H DOWN", "9H DOWN", "12H DOWN", "24H DOWN", "48H DOWN")

name_mapping <- c(
  "48H UP" = "+48 h",
  "24H UP" = "+24 h",
  "12H UP" = "+12 h",
  "9H UP" = "+9 h",
  "6H UP" = "+6 h",
  "3H UP" = "+3 h",
  "POST UP" = "+0 h",
  "MID UP" = "MID",
  "MID DOWN" = "MID",
  "POST DOWN" = "+0 h",
  "3H DOWN" = "+3 h",
  "6H DOWN" = "+6 h",
  "9H DOWN" = "+9 H",
  "12H DOWN" = "+12 h",
  "24H DOWN" = "+24 h",
  "48H DOWN" = "+48 h"
)

df2 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(detected = ifelse(gene %in% previous_genes, "old", "new"))

df2$detected <- factor(df2$detected, levels = c("old", "new"), ordered = TRUE)

ComplexUpset::upset(
  data = df2,
  intersect = rev(ordered_sets),
  labeller=ggplot2::as_labeller(c(
  "48H UP" = "+48 h",
  "24H UP" = "+24 h",
  "12H UP" = "+12 h",
  "9H UP" = "+9 h",
  "6H UP" = "+6 h",
  "3H UP" = "+3 h",
  "POST UP" = "+0 h",
  "MID UP" = "MID",
  "MID DOWN" = "MID",
  "POST DOWN" = "+0 h",
  "3H DOWN" = "+3 h",
  "6H DOWN" = "+6 h",
  "9H DOWN" = "+9 h",
  "12H DOWN" = "+12 h",
  "24H DOWN" = "+24 h",
  "48H DOWN" = "+48 h"
  )),
  base_annotations = list(
    'Overlapping genes' = intersection_size(
      counts = FALSE,
      mapping = aes(
        fill = detected, 
        color = detected
      )
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c('old' = "lightgrey", 'new' = "darkgrey"),
      labels = c("old" = "Yes", "new" = "No"),
      name = str_wrap("Previously reported as exercise-induced DEG", width = 25)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c('old' = "black", 'new' = "black")) +
    scale_pattern_manual(
      values = c("new" = "none", "old" = "stripe"),
      labels = c("old" = "Yes", "new" = "No")
    ) +
    ylim(c(0, 1100)) +
    theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  ),
  matrix = intersection_matrix(
    geom = geom_point(
      shape = 21,
      size = 2.75
    ),
    segment = geom_segment(
      linetype = 'blank',
      color = "black"
    )
  ),
  queries = list(
    upset_query(
      set = 'MID UP',
      color = '#FF7F00',
      fill = '#FF7F00'
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = 'POST UP',
      color = "#FFFF33",
      fill = "#FFFF33"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '3H UP',
      color = "#9ef576",
      fill = "#9ef576"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '6H UP',
      color = "#3b8739",
      fill = "#3b8739"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '9H UP',
      color = "#34ebe8",
      fill = "#34ebe8"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '12H UP',
      color = "#3a09d9",
      fill = "#3a09d9"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '24H UP',
      color = "#a957b5",
      fill = "#a957b5"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '48H UP',
      color = "#A65628",
      fill = "#A65628"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = 'MID DOWN',
      color = '#FF7F00',
      fill = '#FF7F00'
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = 'POST DOWN',
      color = "#FFFF33",
      fill = "#FFFF33"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '3H DOWN',
      color = "#9ef576",
      fill = "#9ef576"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '6H DOWN',
      color = "#3b8739",
      fill = "#3b8739"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '9H DOWN',
      color = "#34ebe8",
      fill = "#34ebe8"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '12H DOWN',
      color = "#3a09d9",
      fill = "#3a09d9"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '24H DOWN',
      color = "#a957b5",
      fill = "#a957b5"
    ),
    upset_query(
      set = '48H DOWN',
      color = "#A65628",
      fill = "#A65628"
    )
  ),
  sort_sets = FALSE,
  min_size = 100,
  set_sizes = upset_set_size() +
    geom_text(aes(label = ..count..), hjust = 1.1, size = 2.5, stat = 'count') +
    ylab('No. DEGs') +
    ylim(c(15000, 0)),
  name = NULL,
  keep_empty_groups = TRUE,
  stripes = c('white'),
  themes = upset_modify_themes(
    list(
      'intersections_matrix' = theme(axis.text.y=element_text(size=6)),
      'overall_sizes' = theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)),
      'intersections' = theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
                              plot.margin = margin(t = 0, b = 0))
    )
  )
)

export::graph2doc(file="plotoverlap.docx", width=8.5,height=6.8)

df2 <- merge(df2, allprevious[, c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype")],
             by.x = "gene", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)

df2x <- df2 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(combo = paste0(c_across(-c(gene, detected, gene_biotype)), collapse = "")) %>%
  ungroup()

combo_total_counts <- df2x %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarise(total_count = n(), .groups = 'drop')

combo_detected_counts <- df2x %>%
  group_by(combo, detected, gene_biotype) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop')

valid_combos <- combo_total_counts %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarise(Totalcount = sum(total_count)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Totalcount > 99) %>%
  pull(combo)

combo_counts <- combo_detected_counts %>%
  dplyr::filter(combo %in% valid_combos)

combo_order <- combo_total_counts %>%
  dplyr::filter(combo %in% valid_combos) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count)) %>%
  pull(combo)

combo_counts <- combo_counts %>% mutate(gene_biotype = recode(gene_biotype,
                               "Mt_rRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "Mt_tRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TR_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "TR_V_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_C_gene" = "Protein coding",
                               "IG_V_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "IG_G_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "scaRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snoRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "misc_RNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "miRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "snRNA" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "protein_coding" = "Protein coding",
                               "unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unitary_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_processed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "transcribed_unprocessed_pseudogene" = "Pseudogene",
                               "ribozyme" = "Other ncRNA",
                               "TEC" = "Unassigned",
                               "artifact" = "Unassigned",
                                 .default = gene_biotype)) %>%
  mutate(gene_biotype = ifelse(is.na(gene_biotype), "Unassigned", gene_biotype))

combo_counts$combo <- factor(combo_counts$combo, levels = combo_order)

combo_counts$detected <- factor(combo_counts$detected, levels = c("new", "old"))

combo_counts$gene_biotype <- factor(combo_counts$gene_biotype,
                                       levels = c("Protein coding", "lncRNA", "Other ncRNA", "Pseudogene", "Unassigned"))

ggplot(combo_counts, aes(x = combo, y = n, fill = gene_biotype, pattern = detected)) +
  geom_col_pattern(aes(pattern_density = n),
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.003,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.02,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6,
                   size = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Intersection", y = "Overlapping genes",
       fill = "Gene biotype",
       pattern = str_wrap("Previously reported as exercise-induced DEG", width = 25)) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("new" = "none", "old" = "stripe"),
                       labels = c("old" = "Yes", "new" = "No")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), limits = c(0, 1500), breaks = seq(200, 1400, by = 200)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = genotypecolour) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 28),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 28)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pattern = "none")),
        pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE,
                               override.aes = list(fill = "white", colour="black")))

export::graph2doc(file="plotoverlap2.docx", width=16,height=4)
```

venn.plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(
    AllUpregulated = allupregulated,
    AllDownregulated = alldownregulated
  ),
  category.names = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
  fill = c("#7B0722", "#0A3C72"),
  alpha = 0.2,
  cat.cex = 1,
  cex = 1.8,
  cat.col = c("#7B0722", "#0A3C72"),
  cat.pos = c(-15, 15),
  margin = 0.2,
  col = NA,
  filename = NULL,
  fontfamily = "Arial",
  cat.fontfamily = "Arial"
)

grid.newpage()

grid.draw(venn.plot)
