#DE of specific single genes (Fig 2f and 2g)
```{r}
plot_gene_expression <- function(ensembl,gene_name,lim1,lim2,lim3) {
  
  expression_data <- efit$EList$E
  timepoints <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")
  desired_order <- c(5,2,4,7,6,3,8,9,1)
  
  mean_by_participant_timepoint <- as.matrix(tapply(expression_data[ensembl, ], 
                                                    list(sampleid, group), 
                                                    mean))

  gene_expression <- mean_by_participant_timepoint[, desired_order]
  gene_expression[, 1:9] <- gene_expression[, 1:9] - gene_expression[, 1]
  gene_expression <- as.data.frame(gene_expression)
  gene_expression <- dplyr::select(gene_expression, 2:9)
  colnames(gene_expression) <- timepoints
  
  mean_values <- apply(gene_expression, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_values <- apply(gene_expression, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(Time = names(mean_values),
                           Mean = mean_values,
                           Standard_Deviation = sd_values)
  
  summary_df$Time <- factor(summary_df$Time, levels = timepoints)
  
  regulation_status <- c(
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(MIDvsPRE)) ifelse(MIDvsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0,"Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(POSTvsPRE)) ifelse(POSTvsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H3vsPRE)) ifelse(H3vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H6vsPRE)) ifelse(H6vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H9vsPRE)) ifelse(H9vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H12vsPRE)) ifelse(H12vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H24vsPRE)) ifelse(H24vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H48vsPRE)) ifelse(H48vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE"
  )
  
  summary_df$Regulation <- regulation_status
  summary_df$Regulation <- factor(summary_df$Regulation, levels = c("Upregulated", "Not DE", "Downregulated"))

  p <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(y = Mean, x = Time, fill = Time)) + 
    geom_tile(aes(fill = Regulation), height = Inf, width = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - Standard_Deviation,
                      ymax = Mean + Standard_Deviation),
                  width = 0.5, size = 0.75) +
    geom_line(show.legend=FALSE) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 1, size = 5, show.legend=FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
       "MID" = "#FF7F00", 
        "+0 h" = "#FFFF33", 
        "+3 h" = "#9ef576", 
        "+6 h" = "#3b8739", 
        "+9 h" = "#34ebe8", 
        "+12 h" = "#3a09d9", 
        "+24 h" = "#a957b5", 
        "+48 h" = "#A65628",
        "Upregulated" = "#e5cdd3",
        "Downregulated" = "#ced8e3",
        "Not DE" = "white"),
        guide = guide_legend(
            override.aes = list(
                color = "black",  
                size = 0.5 
            )
        )
    ) +
    labs(x= NULL, y = bquote(Log[2]*FC ~ "relative to PRE"), fill = "Differential expression") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
          axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 2, size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.title = element_markdown(size = 16),
          axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(lim1, lim2),
                       breaks = seq(-2,10, by = lim3),
                       labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    ggtitle(gene_name)
  
  return(p)
}

plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000109819", "<i>PPARGC1A</i>", -2.4, 4, 1)

export::graph2doc(file="PPARGC1A.docx", width=4,height=2.5)

plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000119508", "<i>NR4A3</i>", -2, 10.5, 2)

export::graph2doc(file="NR4A3.docx", width=4,height=2.5)
```

#Generating dataframe of correlations of differential gene expression to baseline VO2max
```{r}
vo2 <- sampledata %>%
  distinct(SAMPLE.ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
vo2list <- vo2$vo2

#removing participants 12 and 26 due to not completing all biopsies for later time points
vo2check1 <- vo2[-c(26), ]
vo2list1 <- vo2check1$vo2
vo2check2 <- vo2[-c(12,26), ]
vo2list2 <- vo2check2$vo2

VO2correlations <- function(efit) {
  all_genes <- rownames(rna_comp)
  participant_ids <- unique(vo2$SAMPLE.ID)
  desired_order <- c(5, 2, 4, 7, 6, 3, 8, 9, 1)
  
  MIDvsPREUp <- MIDvsPRE[MIDvsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  POSTvsPREUp <- POSTvsPRE[POSTvsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H3vsPREUp <- H3vsPRE[H3vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H6vsPREUp <- H6vsPRE[H6vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H9vsPREUp <- H9vsPRE[H9vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H12vsPREUp <- H12vsPRE[H12vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H24vsPREUp <- H24vsPRE[H24vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  H48vsPREUp <- H48vsPRE[H48vsPRE$logFC > 0,]
  
  MIDvsPREDown <- MIDvsPRE[MIDvsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  POSTvsPREDown <- POSTvsPRE[POSTvsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H3vsPREDown <- H3vsPRE[H3vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H6vsPREDown <- H6vsPRE[H6vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H9vsPREDown <- H9vsPRE[H9vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H12vsPREDown <- H12vsPRE[H12vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H24vsPREDown <- H24vsPRE[H24vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  H48vsPREDown <- H48vsPRE[H48vsPRE$logFC < 0,]
  
features <- data.frame(gene = character(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_correlation_peakfcup_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_pvalue_peakfcup_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_correlation_peakfcdown_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_pvalue_peakfcdown_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_correlation_avgfc_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_pvalue_avgfc_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_correlation_genestdev_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_pvalue_genestdev_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_correlation_auc_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          feature_pvalue_auc_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_tMID_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_tMID_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t0_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t0_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t3_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t3_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t6_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t6_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t9_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t9_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t12_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t12_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t24_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t24_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_correlation_t48_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Up_pvalue_t48_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_tMID_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_tMID_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t0_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t0_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t3_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t3_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t6_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t6_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t9_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t9_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t12_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t12_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t24_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t24_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_correlation_t48_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          Down_pvalue_t48_feature = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
   
  for (i in seq_along(all_genes)) {
    gene <- all_genes[i]
  
    genedata <- as.matrix(tapply(efit$EList$E[gene, ], list(sampleid, group), mean))
    genedata <- genedata[, desired_order]
    genedata[, 1:9] <- genedata[, 1:9] - genedata[, 1]
    genedata <- genedata[, 2:9]
    colnames(genedata) <- c("MID", "0", "3", "6", "9", "12", "24", "48")
    
    timeMID <- genedata[, "MID"]
    time0 <- genedata[, "0"]
    time3 <- genedata[, "3"]
    time6 <- genedata[, "6"]
    time6 <- time6[-26]
    time9 <- genedata[, "9"]
    time9 <- time9[-26]
    time12 <- genedata[, "12"]
    time12 <- time12[-26]
    time24 <- genedata[, "24"]
    time24 <- time24[c(-12,-26)]
    time48 <- genedata[, "48"]
    time48 <- time48[c(-12,-26)]
    
    rows_to_remove <- c(12,26)
    genedata <- genedata[-rows_to_remove, ]
    
    peakfcup <- apply(genedata, 1, max)
    peakfcdown <- apply(genedata, 1, min)
    avgfc <- rowMeans(genedata)
    genestdev <- apply(genedata, 1, sd)
    
    calculate_auc_trapz <- function(row) {
      x <- as.numeric(colnames(genedata))[-1] 
      y <- as.numeric(row[-1])                
      auc <- trapz(x, y)
      return(auc)
    }
    
    auc <- apply(genedata, 1, calculate_auc_trapz)
    auc <- abs(auc)
  
    cor_test <- function(x, y) {
      cor_val <- cor.test(x, y)$estimate
      p_val <- cor.test(x, y)$p.value
      return(list(cor_val, p_val))
    }
    
    c_peakfcup <- cor_test(peakfcup, vo2list2)
    c_peakfcdown <- cor_test(peakfcdown, vo2list2)
    c_avgfc <- cor_test(avgfc, vo2list2)
    c_genestdev <- cor_test(genestdev, vo2list2)
    c_auc <- cor_test(auc, vo2list2)
    
#only keep genes that are differential expressed at time point a correlation is detected
c_MIDUp <- if (gene %in% rownames(MIDvsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(timeMID, vo2list)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t0Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(POSTvsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(time0, vo2list)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}
    
    
c_t3Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H3vsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(time3, vo2list)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t6Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H6vsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(time6, vo2list1)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t9Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H9vsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(time9, vo2list1)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t12Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H12vsPREUp)) {
  cor_test(time12, vo2list1)
} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t24Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H24vsPREUp)) {

} else {
  list(NA, NA)
}

c_t48Up <- if (gene %in% rownames(H48vsPREUp)) {

} else {

}

c_MIDDown <- if (gene %in% rownames(MIDvsPREDown)) {

} else {

}

c_t0Down <- if (gene %in% rownames(POSTvsPREDown)) {

}
    
    
c_t3Down <- if (gene %in% rownames(H3vsPREDown)) {

c_t6Down <- if (gene %in% rownames(H6vsPREDown)) {

    features[i, ] <- list(gene = gene,
                          feature_correlation_peakfcup_feature = c_peakfcup[[1]],
                          feature_pvalue_peakfcup_feature = c_peakfcup[[2]],
                          feature_correlation_peakfcdown_feature = c_peakfcdown[[1]],
                          feature_pvalue_peakfcdown_feature = c_peakfcdown[[2]],

                          feature_correlation_auc_feature = c_auc[[1]],
                          feature_pvalue_auc_feature = c_auc[[2]],

                          Up_pvalue_t0_feature = c_t0Up[[2]],

                          Up_pvalue_t12_feature = c_t12Up[[2]],
                          Up_correlation_t24_feature = c_t24Up[[1]],
                          Up_pvalue_t24_feature = c_t24Up[[2]],

                          Up_pvalue_t48_feature = c_t48Up[[2]],

                          Down_pvalue_t0_feature = c_t0Down[[2]],

                          Down_pvalue_t3_feature = c_t3Down[[2]],

                          Down_pvalue_t6_feature = c_t6Down[[2]],
                          Down_correlation_t9_feature = c_t9Down[[1]],

                          Down_pvalue_t12_feature = c_t12Down[[2]],
                          Down_correlation_t24_feature = c_t24Down[[1]],
                          Down_pvalue_t24_feature = c_t24Down[[2]],
                          Down_correlation_t48_feature = c_t48Down[[1]],
                          Down_pvalue_t48_feature = c_t48Down[[2]])
  }
  
  return(features)
}

VO2correlated <- VO2correlations(efit)

VO2correlated <- VO2correlated %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -gene,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  separate(variable, into = c("regulation", "type", "index"), sep = "_")

VO2correlated <- VO2correlated %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = value)

VO2correlated <- VO2correlated %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(correlation < 0, "negative", "positive"))

VO2correlated <- VO2correlated %>% na.omit()

VO2correlatedfilter <- VO2correlated %>% dplyr::filter(pvalue < 0.05)
```

#Violin plots of VO2max values (Fig 3a)
```{r}
vo2violin <- sampledata %>%
  group_by(SAMPLE.ID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

vo2violin$Sex <- factor(vo2violin$Sex, levels = c("F", "M"))

ggplot(vo2violin, aes(x = Sex, y = vo2, colour = Sex,
                           fill = Sex, shape = Sex)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, adjust = 0.9, alpha = 0.3, show.legend=FALSE) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("M" = 22, "F" = 24)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("M" = "#0d9cff", "F" = "#ef5197"),
                      labels = c("M" = "Males", "F" = "Females")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("M" = "Males", "F" = "Females")) +
  geom_jitter(height = NULL, width = 0.15, size = 3, stroke = 1, colour = "black", show.legend=FALSE) +
  labs(x= NULL,
       y = expression("V\u0307O"[2*max] ~ "(mL·min"^{-1} * "·kg"^{-1} * ")")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,50),
                      breaks = seq(0, 50, by = 10),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16))

export::graph2doc(file="vo2values.docx", width=3,height=4)
```

#no. DEGs correlated to VO2max for timepoints (Fig 3b)
```{r}
correlationcount <- VO2correlatedfilter %>%
  group_by(index,direction,regulation) %>%
  summarize(gene_count = n_distinct(gene))

totalgenes <- data.frame(totalgene = c(as.numeric(nrow(MIDvsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(POSTvsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H3vsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H6vsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H9vsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H12vsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H24vsPRE)),
                                       as.numeric(nrow(H48vsPRE)),
                                       15275, 15275, 15275, 15275, 15275),
index = c("tMID", "t0", "t3", "t6", "t9", "t12", "t24", "t48", "peakfcup", "peakfcdown", "avgfc", "genestdev", "auc"))

merged_df <- merge(correlationcount, totalgenes, by = "index")

merged_df$gene_count <- ifelse(merged_df$regulation == "Down",
                               merged_df$gene_count * -1,
                               merged_df$gene_count)

merged_df$percentage <- (merged_df$gene_count / merged_df$totalgene) *100 

timepointcorrelation <- merged_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(index %in% c("tMID", "t0", "t3", "t6", "t9", "t12", "t24", "t48"))

timepointcorrelation$index <- factor(timepointcorrelation$index, levels = c("tMID", "t0", "t3", "t6", "t9", "t12", "t24", "t48"))

levels(timepointcorrelation$index) <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")

timepointcorrelation <- timepointcorrelation %>%
  mutate(Time_Regulation = paste(index, regulation, sep = "_"))

time_palettecustom2 <- timecolours[-c(1)]

timepointcorrelation <- timepointcorrelation %>%
 mutate(
    effect = case_when(
      direction == "positive" & regulation == "Down" ~ "Greater with lower fitness",
      direction == "positive" & regulation == "Up" ~ "Greater with higher fitness",
      direction == "negative" & regulation == "Down" ~ "Greater with higher fitness",
      direction == "negative" & regulation == "Up" ~ "Greater with lower fitness",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

sumtimepointcorrelation <- timepointcorrelation %>%
  group_by(index, regulation) %>%
  summarize(total_gene_count = sum(gene_count))

ggplot(timepointcorrelation, aes(x = index, y = gene_count, fill = index, pattern = effect)) +
  geom_col_pattern(color = "black", 
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Greater with lower fitness" = "none",
                                  "Greater with higher fitness" = "crosshatch"),
                      labels = c("Greater with lower fitness" = "Greater with lower fitness",
                   "Greater with higher fitness" = "Greater with higher fitness")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) abs(x), 
                     limits = c(-3000, 3000),
                     breaks = seq(-3000, 3000, by = 1000)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = time_palettecustom2) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Downregulated            Upregulated", pattern = "Magnitude of differential expression") +
  ggtitle(expression("Number of DEGs correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max])) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size=12),
        legend.title = element_text(size=12)) +
  guides(fill = FALSE,
         pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE,
                                override.aes = list(fill = "white"))) +
  geom_text(data = sumtimepointcorrelation,
            aes(x = index, y = total_gene_count, label = abs(total_gene_count)),
            inherit.aes=FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(sumtimepointcorrelation$total_gene_count > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 2.75, colour = "black")

export::graph2doc(file="vo2timepoints.docx", width=6.8,height=3.25)
```

#no. DEGs correlated to VO2max for gene features (Supp fig 2a)
```{r}
featurecorrelation <- merged_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(index %in% c("peakfcup", "genestdev", "peakfcdown", "auc"))

featurecorrelation$index <- factor(featurecorrelation$index, levels = c("peakfcup", "peakfcdown", "genestdev", "auc"))

levels(featurecorrelation$index) <- c("Peak FC up", "Peak FC down", "Standard deviation", "AUC")

featurecolours <-  brewer.pal(4, "Set3")

sumfeaturecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>%
  group_by(index, regulation) %>%
  summarize(percentage = sum(round(percentage,1)))

ggplot(featurecorrelation, aes(x = index, y = percentage, fill = index, pattern = direction)) + 
  geom_col_pattern(color = "black", 
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("positive" = "crosshatch","negative" = "none"),
                       labels = c( "negative" = "Greater with lower fitness",
                                   "positive" = "Greater with higher fitness")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = featurecolours) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("Proportion of DEGs correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max]~"(%)"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)), limits= c(0, 50)) +
  labs(x = NULL, pattern = "Magnitude of differential expression") +
  ggtitle(expression("Correlation between differential expression and V\u0307O"[2*max])) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size=12),
        legend.title = element_text(size=12)) +
  guides(fill = FALSE,
         pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE,
                                override.aes = list(fill = "white"))) +
  geom_text(data = sumfeaturecorrelation,
            aes(x = index, y = percentage, label = abs(percentage)),
            inherit.aes=FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(sumfeaturecorrelation$percentage > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 2.75, colour = "black")

export::graph2doc(file="vo2features.docx", width=7.5,height=3.5)
```

#Enrichment of correlation between VO2 and genes at timepoints (Fig 3c)
```{r}
timeVO2_enrichGO <- function(time_point, directionVO2, regulationVO2, comparison) {
  
  correlatedVO2 <- VO2correlatedfilter %>%
  dplyr::filter(index == time_point & direction == directionVO2 & regulation == regulationVO2) %>%
  dplyr::pull(gene)

  correlatedVO2 <- enrichGO(correlatedVO2, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=rownames(comparison), keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

  correlatedVO2 <- as.data.frame(correlatedVO2@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>% 
  mutate(Index = time_point, Direction = directionVO2, Regulation = regulationVO2)
  
  return(correlatedVO2)
}

POSTcorrelationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t0", "positive", "Up", POSTvsPRE)
H3correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t3", "positive", "Up", H3vsPRE)
H6correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t6", "positive", "Up", H6vsPRE)
H9correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t9", "positive", "Up", H9vsPRE)
H12correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t12", "positive", "Up", H12vsPRE)
H24correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t24", "positive", "Up", H24vsPRE)
H48correlationposUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t48", "positive", "Up", H48vsPRE)

POSTcorrelationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t0", "negative", "Up", POSTvsPRE)
H3correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t3", "negative", "Up", H3vsPRE)
H6correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t6", "negative", "Up", H6vsPRE)
H9correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t9", "negative", "Up", H9vsPRE)
H12correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t12", "negative", "Up", H12vsPRE)
H24correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t24", "negative", "Up", H24vsPRE)
H48correlationnegUp <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t48", "negative", "Up", H48vsPRE)

H3correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t3", "positive", "Down", H3vsPRE)
H6correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t6", "positive", "Down", H6vsPRE)
H9correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t9", "positive", "Down", H9vsPRE)
H12correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t12", "positive", "Down", H12vsPRE)
H24correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t24", "positive", "Down", H24vsPRE)
H48correlationposDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t48", "positive", "Down", H48vsPRE)

H3correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t3", "negative", "Down", H3vsPRE)
H6correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t6", "negative", "Down", H6vsPRE)
H9correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t9", "negative", "Down", H9vsPRE)
H12correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t12", "negative", "Down", H12vsPRE)
H24correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t24", "negative", "Down", H24vsPRE)
H48correlationnegDown <- timeVO2_enrichGO("t48", "negative", "Down", H48vsPRE)

timecorrelation <- rbind(H3correlationposUp, H6correlationposUp, H9correlationposUp, H12correlationposUp, H24correlationposUp, H48correlationposUp, H3correlationnegUp, H6correlationnegUp, H9correlationnegUp, H12correlationnegUp, H24correlationnegUp, H48correlationnegUp, H3correlationposDown, H3correlationposDown, H6correlationposDown, H9correlationposDown, H12correlationposDown, H24correlationposDown, H48correlationposDown, H3correlationnegDown, H3correlationnegDown, H6correlationnegDown, H9correlationnegDown, H12correlationnegDown, H24correlationnegDown, H48correlationnegDown)

timecorrelation <- timecorrelation %>%
 mutate(
    effect = case_when(
      Direction == "positive" & Regulation == "Down" ~ "Low",
      Direction == "positive" & Regulation == "Up" ~ "High",
      Direction == "negative" & Regulation == "Down" ~ "High",
      Direction == "negative" & Regulation == "Up" ~ "Low",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))

timecorrelation$GeneRatio <- sapply(strsplit(timecorrelation$GeneRatio, "/"), function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]))

timecorrelation <- timecorrelation %>%
  mutate(Index = recode(Index,
                        "t3" = "+3 h",
                        "t6" = "+6 h",
                        "t9" = "+9 h",
                        "t12" = "+12 h",
                        "t24" = "+24 h",
                        "t48" = "+48 h"))

timecorrelation$Index <- factor(timecorrelation$Index, levels = c("+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h"))

timecorrelation$effect <- factor(timecorrelation$effect , levels = c("Low", "High"))

timecorrelation$Regulation <- factor(timecorrelation$Regulation , levels = c("Up", "Down"))

time_background <- strip_nested(
  text_x = elem_list_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
  background_x = elem_list_rect(
    fill = c(
      "+3 h" = "#9ef576",
      "+6 h" = "#3b8739",
      "+9 h" = "#34ebe8",
      "+12 h" = "#3a09d9",
      "+24 h" = "#a957b5",
      "+48 h" = "#A65628",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3")))

timecorrelation$Description  <- factor(timecorrelation$Description, levels = unique(timecorrelation$Description))

ggplot(timecorrelation, aes(x = effect, y = Description, size = Count, colour = p.adjust, fill = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(timecorrelation$Description))) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of genes", range = c(0.5, 7)) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05), breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "grey50") +
  scale_colour_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05), breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "grey50") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = NULL,
       x = "Cardiorespiratory fitness for which a greater magnitude of expression was observed") +
  ggtitle(expression("GOBP enrichment of genes with differential expression correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max])) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9), legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey80", color = "grey50"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        plot.margin=unit(c(0,0,0,0.5),"cm")) + 
  facet_nested(~ Index * Regulation, scales = "free_y",
               switch = "y", space = "free_y",
               strip = time_background) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(legend.position = "top"), color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top"))

filtered_values <- c("cytoplasmic translation", "chromosome organization", "innate immune response", "mitochondrial gene expression", "mitochondrial translation", "mitochondrion organization","protein targeting to mitochondrion", "RNA splicing", "RNA methylation", "ribosome biogenesis", "protein folding", "muscle structure development")

filteredtimecorrelation <- timecorrelation %>% dplyr::filter(Description %in% filtered_values)

filteredtimecorrelation <- filteredtimecorrelation %>%
  mutate(Description = if_else(
    str_starts(Description, "rRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "ncRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "RNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "tRNA") |  
    str_starts(Description, "DNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "mRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "miRNA"),
    Description,
    sub("^(\\w)(.*)", "\\U\\1\\L\\2", Description, perl = TRUE)
  ))

filteredtimecorrelation$Description[filteredtimecorrelation$Description == "Mitochondrion organization"] <- "Mitochondrion organisation"
filteredtimecorrelation$Description[filteredtimecorrelation$Description == "Chromosome organization"] <- "Chromosome organisation"

filteredtimecorrelation$Description  <- factor(filteredtimecorrelation$Description , levels = c("Cytoplasmic translation", "Innate immune response", "Chromosome organisation", "Mitochondrial gene expression", "Mitochondrial translation", "Mitochondrion organisation","Protein targeting to mitochondrion", "RNA splicing", "RNA methylation", "Ribosome biogenesis", "Protein folding", "Muscle structure development"), ordered = TRUE)

ggplot(filteredtimecorrelation, aes(x = effect, y = Description, size = Count, colour = p.adjust, fill = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21) +
   scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(filteredtimecorrelation$Description))) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of genes",
                        range = c(0.5, 7.5),
                        breaks = c(10,25,75,175)) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                       limits = c(0, 0.05),
                       breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                       na.value = "black") +
    scale_colour_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value",
                           colours = c("red", "blue"),
                           limits = c(0, 0.05),
                           breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                           na.value = "black") +

  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "Cardiorespiratory fitness for which a greater magnitude of expression was observed") +
  ggtitle(expression("GOBP enrichment of genes with differential expression correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max])) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, margin = margin(t = 10)),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        legend.title.align = 0.5,
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey80", color = "grey50"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm")) + 
  facet_nested(~ Index * Regulation, scales = "free_y", switch = "y", space = "free_y", strip = time_background) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(legend.position = "top"), color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top"))

export::graph2doc(file="vo2timepointcorrelation.docx", width=11,height=5.5)
```

#Enrichment of correlation between VO2 and genes using gene features (Supp fig 2b)
```{r}
featureVO2_enrichGO <- function(feature, directionVO2) {
  
  correlatedVO2 <- VO2correlatedfilter %>%
  dplyr::filter(index == feature & direction == directionVO2 & regulation == "feature") %>%
  dplyr::pull(gene)

  correlatedVO2 <- enrichGO(correlatedVO2, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                                 universe=rownames(rna_comp), keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                                 ont = "BP",pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                                 pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)

  correlatedVO2 <- as.data.frame(correlatedVO2@result) %>% arrange(p.adjust) %>%
  mutate(Index = feature, Direction = directionVO2, Regulation = "Gene feature")
  
  return(correlatedVO2)
}

peakfcupcorrelationpos<- featureVO2_enrichGO("peakfcup", "positive")
peakfcupcorrelationneg <- featureVO2_enrichGO("peakfcup", "negative")
peakfcdowncorrelationpos<- featureVO2_enrichGO("peakfcdown", "positive")
peakfcdowncorrelationneg <- featureVO2_enrichGO("peakfcdown", "negative")
genestdevcorrelationpos<- featureVO2_enrichGO("genestdev", "positive")
genestdevcorrelationneg <- featureVO2_enrichGO("genestdev", "negative")
auccorrelationpos<- featureVO2_enrichGO("auc", "positive")
auccorrelationneg <- featureVO2_enrichGO("auc", "negative")

featurecorrelation <- rbind(peakfcupcorrelationpos, peakfcdowncorrelationpos, genestdevcorrelationpos, auccorrelationpos, peakfcupcorrelationneg, peakfcdowncorrelationneg, genestdevcorrelationneg, auccorrelationneg)

featurecorrelation$GeneRatio <- sapply(strsplit(featurecorrelation$GeneRatio, "/"), function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]))

featurecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>%
  mutate(Index = recode(Index,
                        "peakfcup" = "Peak FC up",
                        "peakfcdown" = "Peak FC down",
                        "genestdev" = "Standard deviation",
                        "auc" = "AUC"))

featurecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>%
 mutate(
    effect = case_when(
      Direction == "negative" ~ "Greater with lower fitness",
      Direction == "positive" ~ "Greater with higher fitness",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

featurecorrelationcheck <- featurecorrelation %>% dplyr::filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

featurecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>% mutate(Regulation = NA)

featurecorrelation$Index <- factor(featurecorrelation$Index, levels = c("Peak FC up", "Peak FC down", "Standard deviation", "AUC"))

featurecorrelation$Direction <- factor(featurecorrelation$Direction , levels = c("negative", "positive"))

feature_background <- strip_nested(
  text_x = elem_list_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
  background_x = elem_list_rect(
    fill = c(
      "Peak FC up" = "#8DD3C7",
      "Peak FC down" = "#BEBADA",
      "Standard deviation" = "#FFFFB3",
      "AUC" = "#FB8072")))

feature_values <- c("glycosylation", "regulation of apoptotic signaling pathway", "nucleus organization", "skeletal muscle contraction", "RNA splicing", "ribosome biogenesis", "protein folding")

featurecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>% dplyr::filter(Description %in% feature_values)

featurecorrelation <- featurecorrelation %>%
    mutate(Description = if_else(
    str_starts(Description, "rRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "ncRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "RNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "tRNA") |  
    str_starts(Description, "DNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "mRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "miRNA"),
    Description,
    sub("^(\\w)(.*)", "\\U\\1\\L\\2", Description, perl = TRUE)
  ))

featurecorrelation$Description[featurecorrelation$Description == "Nucleus organization"] <- "Nucleus organisation"

featurecorrelation$Description  <- factor(featurecorrelation$Description , levels = c("Glycosylation", "Regulation of apoptotic signaling pathway", "Nucleus organisation", "Skeletal muscle contraction", "RNA splicing", "Ribosome biogenesis", "Protein folding"), ordered = TRUE)

ggplot(featurecorrelation, aes(x = Direction, y = Description, size = Count, color = p.adjust, fill = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point(shape=21) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("negative" = "Low", "positive" = "High")) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(featurecorrelation$Description))) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of genes", range = c(0.5, 6)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05), breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05), breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "Cardiorespiratory fitness for which a greater magnitude of expression was observed") +
  ggtitle(expression("GOBP enrichment of genes with expression correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max])) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        legend.title.align = 0.5,
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey80", color = "grey50"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm"),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.5, "cm")) + 
  facet_nested(~ Index, scales = "free_y", switch = "y", space = "free_y",
               strip = feature_background) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(legend.position = "top"), color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top"))

export::graph2doc(file="featuretimepointcorrelation.docx", width=11,height=3.75)
```

#filter tertiles of VO2 values for plotting of specific pathways (Fig 3d)
```{r}
create_participant_group_plot <- function(Description, Index, effect, plot_title) {
  
  Ribobiogenesisgene <- timecorrelation %>%
    dplyr::filter(Description == !!Description) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Index == !!Index) %>%
    dplyr::filter(effect == !!effect) %>%
    pull(geneID) %>%
    strsplit(split = "/") %>%
    unlist()
  
  sampledata_distinct <- sampledata %>%
    distinct(SAMPLE.ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!SAMPLE.ID %in% c("P12", "P26"))
  
  sampledata_sorted <- sampledata_distinct %>%
    arrange(desc(vo2))
  
  top_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice(1:5) %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
  top_5 <- as.numeric(gsub("^P0*", "", top_5))
  
  middle_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice((n()/2 - 2):(n()/2 + 2)) %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
  middle_5 <- as.numeric(gsub("^P0*", "", middle_5))
  
  bottom_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice((n() - 4):n()) %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
  bottom_5 <- as.numeric(gsub("^P0*", "", bottom_5))
  
  participantgrouping <- function(GOBP, participantlist, participants) {
    all_genes <- GOBP
    desired_order <- c(5, 2, 4, 7, 6, 3, 8, 9, 1)
    
    features <- data.frame(gene = character(),
                           participants = character(),
                           averageMID = numeric(),
                           averagePOST = numeric(),
                           average3H = numeric(),
                           average6H = numeric(),
                           average9H = numeric(),
                           average12H = numeric(),
                           average24H = numeric(),
                           average48H = numeric(),
                           stdevMID = numeric(),
                           stdevPOST = numeric(),
                           stdev3H = numeric(),
                           stdev6H = numeric(),
                           stdev9H = numeric(),
                           stdev12H = numeric(),
                           stdev24H = numeric(),
                           stdev48H = numeric(),
                           stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    
    for (i in seq_along(all_genes)) {
      gene <- all_genes[i]
      
      genedata <- as.matrix(tapply(efit$EList$E[gene, ], list(sampleid, group), mean))
      genedata <- genedata[, desired_order]
      genedata[, 1:9] <- genedata[, 1:9] - genedata[, 1]
      genedata <- genedata[, 2:9]
      colnames(genedata) <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")
      genedata <- genedata[participantlist, ]
      
      geneaverage <- colMeans(genedata, na.rm = TRUE)
      genestdev <- apply(genedata, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      features[i, ] <- list(gene = gene,
                            participants = participants,
                            averageMID = geneaverage["MID"],
                            "average+0 h" = geneaverage["+0 h"],
                            "average+3 h" = geneaverage["+3 h"],
                            "average+6 h" = geneaverage["+6 h"],
                            "average+9 h" = geneaverage["+9 h"],
                            "average+12 h" = geneaverage["+12 h"],
                            "average+24 h" = geneaverage["+24 h"],
                            "average+48 h" = geneaverage["+48 h"],
                            "stdevMID" = genestdev["MID"],
                            "stdev+0 h" = genestdev["+0 h"],
                            "stdev+3 h" = genestdev["+3 h"],
                            "stdev+6 h" = genestdev["+6 h"],
                            "stdev+9 h" = genestdev["+9 h"],
                            "stdev+12 h" = genestdev["+12 h"],
                            "stdev+24 h" = genestdev["+24 h"],
                            "stdev+48 h" = genestdev["+48 h"])
    }
    
    return(features)
  }
  
  top5ribosome <- participantgrouping(Ribobiogenesisgene, top_5, "Top five")
  middle5ribosome <- participantgrouping(Ribobiogenesisgene, middle_5, "Middle five")
  bottom5ribosome <- participantgrouping(Ribobiogenesisgene, bottom_5, "Bottom five")
  
  riboGOBP <- rbind(top5ribosome, middle5ribosome, bottom5ribosome)
  
  riboGOBP <- riboGOBP %>%
    gather(key = "Time", value = "LogFC", -gene, -participants) %>%
    mutate(ValueType = ifelse(grepl("^average", Time), "Average", "Stdev"),
           Time = gsub("^average|^stdev", "", Time))
  
  riboGOBP_avg <- riboGOBP %>%
    dplyr::filter(ValueType == "Average") %>%
    rename(Average_LogFC = LogFC)
  
  riboGOBP_stdev <- riboGOBP %>%
    dplyr::filter(ValueType == "Stdev") %>%
    rename(Stdev_LogFC = LogFC)
  
  riboGOBP_combined <- riboGOBP_avg %>%
    left_join(riboGOBP_stdev, by = c("gene", "participants", "Time"))
  
  riboGOBP_combined <- riboGOBP_combined %>%
    mutate(Time = recode(Time, 
                       "MID" = "MID",
                       "POST" = "+0 h",
                       "3H" = "+3 h",
                       "6H" = "+6 h",
                       "9H" = "+9 h",
                       "12H" = "+12 h",
                       "24H" = "+24 h",
                       "48H" = "+48 h"))
  
  riboGOBP_combined$Time <- factor(riboGOBP_combined$Time,
                                   levels = c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h"))
  
  riboGOBP_combined$participants <- factor(riboGOBP_combined$participants, levels = c("Top five", "Middle five", "Bottom five"))
  
  average_GOBP_combined <- riboGOBP_combined %>%
    group_by(participants, Time) %>%
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  vo2plotted <- ggplot(average_GOBP_combined,
                       aes(y = Average_LogFC, x = Time, colour = participants, group = participants)) + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_line(size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymax = (Average_LogFC + Stdev_LogFC),
                      ymin = (Average_LogFC - Stdev_LogFC)),
                  width = 0.5, size = 0.6, position = position_dodge(.3),
                  show.legend = FALSE) + 
    geom_point(size = 4, show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
      "Top five" = "#081c15",
      "Middle five" = "#2d6a4f",
      "Bottom five" = "#52b788")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = bquote(Log[2]*FC ~ "relative to PRE"), 
         colour = expression("Participant V\u0307O"[2*max] ~ "values")) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 2, size = 12),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1)) +
    ggtitle(plot_title)
  
  return(vo2plotted)
}

vo2riboplot <- create_participant_group_plot("ribosome biogenesis", "+24 h", "Low", "Ribosome biogenesis (GO:0042254)")
vo2mitoplot <- create_participant_group_plot("mitochondrial gene expression", "+12 h", "Low", "Mitochondrial gene expression (GO:0140053)")

grid.arrange(vo2mitoplot, vo2riboplot, ncol=2, widths = c(3, 3))

export::graph2doc(file="vo2 genes correlation.docx", width=8,height=2.5)

sampledata_distinct <- sampledata %>%
    distinct(SAMPLE.ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!SAMPLE.ID %in% c("P12", "P26"))
  
sampledata_sorted <- sampledata_distinct %>%
    arrange(desc(vo2))
  
top_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice(1:5) %>% dplyr::select(vo2, Sex) %>% mutate(group = "top_5")
middle_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice((n()/2 - 2):(n()/2 + 2)) %>% dplyr::select(vo2, Sex) %>% mutate(group = "middle_5")
bottom_5 <- sampledata_sorted %>% slice((n() - 4):n()) %>% dplyr::select(vo2, Sex) %>% mutate(group = "bottom_5")

vo2violin2 <- rbind(top_5, middle_5, bottom_5)

ggplot(vo2violin2, aes(x = group, y = vo2, fill = Sex, shape = Sex)) +
  geom_violin(vo2violin2, mapping = aes(x = group, y = vo2, fill = group), inherit.aes = FALSE, trim = FALSE, adjust = 0.9, show.legend=FALSE, width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("M" = "#0d9cff", "F" = "#ef5197",
                               "top_5" = "#081c15", "middle_5" = "#2d6a4f", "bottom_5" = "#52b788")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("top_5" = "#081c15", "middle_5" = "#2d6a4f", "bottom_5" = "#52b788"),
                      labels = c("top_5" = "Top 5", "middle_5" = "Middle 5", "bottom_5" = "Bottom 5")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("top_5" = "Top 5", "middle_5" = "Middle 5", "bottom_5" = "Bottom 5")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("M" = 22, "F" = 24)) +
  geom_jitter(height = NULL, width = 0.25, size = 3.5, stroke = 1, colour = "black", show.legend=FALSE) +
  labs(x= NULL, y = expression("V\u0307O"[2*max] ~ "(mL·min"^{-1} * "·kg"^{-1} * ")")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,50), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20))
  
export::graph2doc(file="vo2violin2.docx", width=3.5,height=4)
```

#Piechart of how many genes are DE of those within Mitocarta3.0 (Fig 4b)
```{r}
mitocarta <- read.xlsx("data/Databases/MitoCarta30.xlsx")

mitocartafix  <- mitocarta  %>%
  separate_rows(EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130, sep = "\\|")

mitoDE <- merge(rna_comp, mitocartafix, by = "EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130", "row.names", keep.rownames = TRUE)
mitoall <- merge(rna_compALL, mitocartafix, by = "EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130", "row.names", keep.rownames = TRUE)
mitoDEoriginal <- mitoDE
rownames(mitoDEoriginal) <- mitoDEoriginal$Row.names

Gomit <- mitocarta
notdetectedmito <- unique(setdiff(mitocarta$Symbol, mitoall$Symbol))
mitoprevious <- intersect(previous_genes,mitocarta$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
filtered_mitoDE <- mitocarta %>%
  dplyr::filter(EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130 %in% mitoprevious)
mitoprevious <- unique(filtered_mitoDE$Symbol)
filtered_mitoDE <- mitoDE[mitoDE$Symbol %in% mitoprevious, ]

mitototal <- as.numeric(nrow(mitocarta))
mitoDEgene <- as.numeric(nrow(mitoDE))
notdetectedmito <-as.numeric(length(notdetectedmito))
notDEmito <- mitototal - mitoDEgene - notdetectedmito

Mitopiechart <- data.frame(
  category = c("Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes differentially<br>expressed in response to exercise", 
               "Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes quantified but <b>not<br>differentially expressed</b> in response to exercise",
              "Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes <b>not detected</b><br> or <b>filtered out</b> due to low expression"),
  value = c(mitoDEgene, notDEmito, notdetectedmito)
)

category_colors <- c("lightgrey", "darkgrey","#d65c5c")

Mitopiechart$category <- factor(
  Mitopiechart$category,
  levels = rev(c(
    "Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes differentially<br>expressed in response to exercise",
    "Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes quantified but <b>not<br>differentially expressed</b> in response to exercise",
    "Mitochondrial&nbsp;&nbsp;genes <b>not detected</b><br> or <b>filtered out</b> due to low expression"
  ))
)

Mitopiechart$label <- paste0(Mitopiechart$value)

ggplot(Mitopiechart, aes(x = "", y = value, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1, stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = category_colors) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = label, y = cumsum(value) - value/2.5),
    size = 8, nudge_x = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE, segment.color = "black"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_markdown(size = 12),
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20)
  )

export::graph2doc(file="mitopie.docx", width=9,height=3.5)
```

#No. mito DEGs at each time point and with no. previously ided genes indicated (Fig 4c)
```{r}
process_DE_genes <- function(data, time_point, previous_genes) {
  
  DE_down <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
  logFCdown <- as.numeric(mean(DE_down$logFC))
  DE_down <- rownames(DE_down)
  
  DE_down_previous <- intersect(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_previous <- length(DE_down_previous)
  DE_down_previous <- DE_down_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point, Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(logFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "logFC")
  DE_down_previous$Genes <- -DE_down_previous$Genes
  
  DE_down_new <- setdiff(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_new <- length(DE_down_new)
  DE_down_new <- DE_down_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(logFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "logFC")
  DE_down_new$Genes <- -DE_down_new$Genes
  
  DE_up <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
  logFCup <- as.numeric(mean(DE_up$logFC))
  DE_up <- rownames(DE_up)
  
  DE_up_previous <- intersect(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_previous <- length(DE_up_previous)
  DE_up_previous <- DE_up_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point, Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(logFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "logFC")
  
  DE_up_new <- setdiff(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_new <- length(DE_up_new)
  DE_up_new <- DE_up_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(logFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "logFC")
  
  DE_data <- rbind(DE_down_previous, DE_up_previous, DE_down_new, DE_up_new)
  return(DE_data)
}

TotalDEsubset <- function(contrast, subset) {
    rownames_totalDE <- rownames(contrast)
    filtered_rows <- rownames_totalDE[rownames_totalDE %in% subset]
  return(contrast[filtered_rows, , drop = FALSE])}

MitDE1 <- TotalDEsubset(MIDvsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE2 <- TotalDEsubset(POSTvsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE3 <- TotalDEsubset(H3vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE4 <- TotalDEsubset(H6vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE5 <- TotalDEsubset(H9vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE6 <- TotalDEsubset(H12vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE7 <- TotalDEsubset(H24vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)
MitDE8 <- TotalDEsubset(H48vsPRE, mitocartafix$EnsemblGeneID_mapping_version_20200130)

MitoDE1 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE1, "MID", previous_genes)
MitoDE2 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE2, "+0 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE3 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE3, "+3 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE4 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE4, "+6 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE5 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE5, "+9 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE6 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE6, "+12 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE7 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE7, "+24 h", previous_genes)
MitoDE8 <- process_DE_genes(MitDE8, "+48 h", previous_genes)

MitDE <- rbind (MitoDE1, MitoDE2, MitoDE3, MitoDE4, MitoDE5, MitoDE6, MitoDE7, MitoDE8)

MitDE$Time <- as.character(MitDE$Time)
MitDE$Time <- factor(MitDE$Time, levels = unique(MitDE$Time))

mitotimepointcorrelation <- MitDE %>%
  group_by(Time, Direction) %>%
  summarize(total_gene_count = sum(Genes))

ggplot(data = MitDE, aes(x = Time, y = Genes, fill = Direction, pattern = Previous)) +
  geom_rect(xmin = 0, xmax = 9,
              ymin = 0, ymax = 7000, size = 1,
              fill = "#e5cdd3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_rect(xmin = 0, xmax = 9,
              ymin = -7000, ymax = 0, size = 1,
              fill = "#ced8e3", alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_col_pattern(color = "black", 
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "No. DEGs relative to PRE", fill = "Number of DEGs",
       pattern =str_wrap("Previously reported as exercise-induced DEG", width = 25)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("Up" = "#ed3434", "Down" = "#b03333"),
                    labels = c("Up" = "Upregulated", "Down" = "Downregulated")) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Never" = "none", "Previously reported" = "stripe"),
                           labels = c("Previously reported" = "Yes", "Never" = "No")) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Average DEG fold change", values = c(Up=15, Down = 18),
                   labels = c("Up" = "Upregulated genes", "Down" = "Downregulated genes")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("        No. DEGs relative to PRE\n \n Downregulated              Upregulated"),
                     limits = c(-630, 400),
                     breaks = seq(-600, 400, by = 200),
                     labels = function(x) abs(x)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 5, l = 20), size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
  ggtitle("Exercise-induced mitochondrial DEGs") +
  guides(fill = "none",
         pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, override.aes = list(fill = "white"))) +
  geom_text(data = mitotimepointcorrelation %>% dplyr::filter(total_gene_count != 0),
            aes(x = Time, y = total_gene_count, label = abs(total_gene_count)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(mitotimepointcorrelation$total_gene_count[mitotimepointcorrelation$total_gene_count != 0] > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 2.75, colour = "black")

export::graph2doc(file="mitodegs.docx", width=6,height=3.5)
```

#Soft clustering using c-means with mfuzz package (Fig 4d)
```{r}
mitoDEsoft <- mitoDEoriginal[,2:9]
colnames(mitoDEsoft) <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")

mitoDEsoft <- as.matrix(mitoDEsoft)
tmp_expr <- new('ExpressionSet', exprs = mitoDEsoft)

m1 <- mestimate(tmp_expr)

plot.new()
Dmin(tmp_expr,m1,crange=seq(2,20,2),repeats=1,visu=TRUE)

#Repeated clustering (Supp fig 4a)
export::graph2doc(file="mitoclustersrepeatedclustering.docx", width=5,height=4)

#this is just so the clusters are in the same order as publication!
desired_sizes <- c(24, 151, 234, 97, 154, 377)
  
#to get the same cluster identities each time
repeat {
  fuzzcluster <- mfuzz(tmp_expr, centers = 6, m = m1)
  
  cluster_sizes <- as.numeric(fuzzcluster$size)
  
  if(all(cluster_sizes == desired_sizes)) {
    print("Desired cluster sizes and order achieved!")
    break
  }
}

plot.new()
overlapfcraw <- Mfuzz::overlap(fuzzcluster)
overlap.plot(fuzzcluster, thres = 0.24, overlapfcraw)

#Mito clusters PCA (Supp fig 4b)
export::graph2doc(file="mitoclustersPCA.docx", width=5,height=4)

#Determination of number of genes within cluster (only considers a genes highest membership - hard cluster for sake of identification)
fuzzcluster$size
clustersize <- fuzzcluster$size

clusterprofile <- acore(tmp_expr,fuzzcluster, min.acore=0.1)

cluster1 <- clusterprofile[[1]]
genes_to_test1 <- cluster1$NAME

cluster2 <- clusterprofile[[2]]
genes_to_test2 <- cluster2$NAME

cluster3 <- clusterprofile[[3]]
genes_to_test3 <- cluster3$NAME

cluster4 <- clusterprofile[[4]]
genes_to_test4 <- cluster4$NAME

cluster5 <- clusterprofile[[5]]
genes_to_test5 <- cluster5$NAME

cluster6 <- clusterprofile[[6]]
genes_to_test6 <- cluster6$NAME

membership <- fuzzcluster$membership
colnames(membership) <- c("one", "two", "three", "four", "five", "six")

create_cluster_plot <- function(gene_cluster_list, membership_column, cluster_name) {
  cluster_data <- rna_comp[rownames(rna_comp) %in% gene_cluster_list, ]
  cluster_data <- cluster_data[, 1:8]
  cluster_data <- merge(cluster_data, membership, by.x = 0, by.y = 0)
  colnames(cluster_data) <- c("Gene", "MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h", "one", "two", "three", "four", "five", "six")
  
cluster_data <- cluster_data %>%
  dplyr::select("Gene", "MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h", membership_column)

cluster_plot_data <- gather(cluster_data, key = "Time", value = "LogFC", -Gene, -{{membership_column}})
  colnames(cluster_plot_data) <- c("Gene", "Membership", "Time", "LogFC")
  cluster_plot_data$Time <- as.character(cluster_plot_data$Time)
  cluster_plot_data$Time <- factor(cluster_plot_data$Time, levels = unique(cluster_plot_data$Time))
  cluster_plot_data <- na.omit(cluster_plot_data)
  
  cluster_plot <- ggplot(cluster_plot_data %>% dplyr::filter(Membership > 0),
                         aes(y = LogFC, x = Time, group = Gene, color = Membership)) +
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 0.5) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = bquote(Log[2] * FC ~ "relative to PRE")) +
    geom_line(size = 0.3) +
    scale_color_gradientn(name = "Cluster membership",
                          colours = c("yellow", "navy"),
                          limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0.2, 1, by = 0.4),
                          guide = "none") +
    stat_summary(aes(group = 1), geom = "line", fun = "mean", colour = "green", size = 1.5) +
    ggtitle(sprintf("%s (%d genes)", cluster_name, length(unique(cluster_plot_data$Gene[cluster_plot_data$Membership > 0])))) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(strip.text.y = element_text(size = 1))
  
  return(cluster_plot)
}

cluster1_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test1, "one", "Cluster 1")
cluster2_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test2, "two", "Cluster 2")
cluster3_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test3, "three", "Cluster 3")
cluster4_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test4, "four", "Cluster 4")
cluster5_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test5, "five", "Cluster 5")
cluster6_plot <- create_cluster_plot(genes_to_test6, "six", "Cluster 6")

grid.arrange(cluster1_plot, cluster2_plot, cluster3_plot, cluster4_plot, cluster5_plot, cluster6_plot, ncol=3, widths = c(3, 3, 3))

export::graph2doc(file="mitoclusters.docx", width=10,height=5)

ggplot(data.frame(value = c(0, 1)),
                                aes(x = 1, y = value, color = value)) +
  geom_point(size = 0) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    name = expression(atop("Cluster", "membership")),
    colours = c("yellow", "navy"),
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0.2, 1, by = 0.2),
    guide = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", direction = "vertical")
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "left",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.margin = margin(l = 20, unit = "pt"),
    legend.title.align = 0.75
  )

export::graph2doc(file="mitoclusterslegend1.docx", width=2,height=3)

ggplot(data.frame(x = 1, y = 1), aes(x, y)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 1, y = 1, yend = 1), color = "green", size = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.1, y = 1, label = expression(atop("Central cluster", "identity")), color = "black", hjust = 0, size = 5) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 10, 5, 0)
  ) +
  xlim(0, 2) + ylim(0.9, 1.1)

export::graph2doc(file="mitoclusterslegend2.docx", width=6,height=3)
```
