#Sex-specific expression of SNX30, DNMBP, CTIF, and DAAM2-AS1 (Fig 5c)
```{r}
sampleidmen <- sampledata %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == "M") %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
sampleidmen <- unique(sampleidmen)

sampleiddifwomen <- sampledata %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == "F") %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
sampleiddifwomen <- unique(sampleiddifwomen)

plot_sex_gene_expression <- function(gene_name, symbol, lim1, lim2, lim3, xvalue, yvalue, y_axis_title = TRUE) {
  
  expression_data <- efitsex$EList$E
  timepoints <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")
  desired_order <- c(5,2,4,7,6,3,8,9,1)
  
  mean_by_participant_timepoint <- as.matrix(tapply(expression_data[gene_name, ], 
                                                    list(sampleid, group), 
                                                    mean))
  
  gene_expression <- mean_by_participant_timepoint[, desired_order]
  gene_expression[, 1:9] <- gene_expression[, 1:9] - gene_expression[, 1]
  gene_expression <- as.data.frame(gene_expression)
  gene_expression <- dplyr::select(gene_expression, 2:9)
  colnames(gene_expression) <- timepoints
  
  men_gene_expression <- gene_expression[rownames(gene_expression) %in% sampleidmen, ]
  women_gene_expression <- gene_expression[rownames(gene_expression) %in% sampleiddifwomen, ]
  
  men_mean_values <- apply(men_gene_expression, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  men_sd_values <- apply(men_gene_expression, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  women_mean_values <- apply(women_gene_expression, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  women_sd_values <- apply(women_gene_expression, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(Time = names(men_mean_values),
                           Mean_men = men_mean_values,
                           StandardDeviation_men = men_sd_values,
                           Mean_women = women_mean_values,
                           StandardDeviation_women = women_sd_values)
  
  summary_df <- summary_df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Mean_men, StandardDeviation_men, Mean_women, StandardDeviation_women),
                 names_to = c("Measure", "Sex"),
                 names_sep = "_") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Measure, values_from = value)
  
  summary_df$Time <- factor(summary_df$Time, levels = timepoints)
  
  annotate_df <- data.frame(x = xvalue, y = yvalue)
  
  y_axis_title_element <- if (y_axis_title) element_text(vjust = 2, size = 16) else element_blank()
  
  p <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(y = Mean, x = Time, fill = Sex, colour = Sex, group = Sex, shape = Sex)) + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - StandardDeviation,
                      ymax = Mean + StandardDeviation),
                  width = 0.5, size = 0.75, position = position_dodge(.25), show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_line(show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(colour = "black", stroke = 1, size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("women" = 24, "men" = 22)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("women" = "#ef5197", "men" = "#0d9cff"),
                      labels = c("women" = "Females", "men" = "Males")) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("women" = "#ef5197", "men" = "#0d9cff")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = bquote(Log[2]*FC ~ "relative to PRE")) +
    geom_text(data = annotate_df, aes(x = x, y = y), label = "*",
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 14, colour = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.title.y = y_axis_title_element,
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
      plot.title = element_markdown(size = 20),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(lim1, lim2), breaks = seq(lim1, lim2, by = lim3), labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    ggtitle(symbol)
  
  return(p)
}

SNX30 <- plot_sex_gene_expression("ENSG00000148158", "<i>SNX30</i>", -1.5, 1.5, 0.5, "+6 h", 1.2, y_axis_title = TRUE)

DNMBP <- plot_sex_gene_expression("ENSG00000107554", "<i>DNMBP</i>", -1, 2, 0.5, "+6 h", 1.85, y_axis_title = FALSE)

DAAM2AS1 <- plot_sex_gene_expression("ENSG00000235033", "<i>DAAM2-AS1</i>", -1.5, 2.5, 0.5, c("+6 h", "+9 h"),c(1.8, 2.3), y_axis_title = FALSE)

CTIF <- plot_sex_gene_expression("ENSG00000134030", "<i>CTIF</i>", -1, 1.5, 0.5, "+12 h", 1.2, y_axis_title = FALSE)

grid.arrange(SNX30, DNMBP, DAAM2AS1, CTIF, ncol = 4)

export::graph2doc(file="sexspecificexercisegenes.docx", width=16,height=3.5)

legend_df <- data.frame(
  Sex = c("men", "women"),
  x = c(1, 2), 
  y = c(1, 1)
)

legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Sex, shape = Sex, colour = Sex)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, stroke = 1) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("women" = 24, "men" = 22)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("women" = "#ef5197", "men" = "#0d9cff"),
                    labels = c("women" = "Females", "men" = "Males")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("women" = "#ef5197", "men" = "#0d9cff")) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = c(22, 24), size = 5, stroke = 0.75, colour = "black")),
    shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = c("#0d9cff", "#ef5197"), size = 5, stroke = 1, colour = "black"))
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

legend_only <- get_legend(legend_plot)

cowplot::plot_grid(legend_only)

export::graph2doc(file="sexspecificexercisegeneslegend.docx", width=3,height=3.5)
```

#Single gene sex-specific AUC expression (not shown)
```{r}
allmenDEGs <- unique(c(rownames(MIDvsPREmen), rownames(POSTvsPREmen), rownames(H3vsPREmen), rownames(H6vsPREmen), rownames(H9vsPREmen),
              rownames(H12vsPREmen), rownames(H24vsPREmen), rownames(H48vsPREmen)))

alldifwomenDEGs <- unique(c(rownames(MIDvsPREdifwomen), rownames(POSTvsPREdifwomen), rownames(H3vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H6vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H9vsPREdifwomen),
              rownames(H12vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H24vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H48vsPREdifwomen)))

allsexDEGS <- unique(c(allmenDEGs, alldifwomenDEGs))

sampleidmen <- sampledata %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == "M") %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
sampleidmen <- unique(sampleidmen)

sampleiddifwomen <- sampledata %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == "F") %>% pull(SAMPLE.ID)
sampleiddifwomen <- unique(sampleiddifwomen)

perform_t_tests_all_genesAUC <- function(vsex) {
  all_genes <- allsexDEGS
  desired_order <- c(5,2,4,7,6,3,8,9,1)
      
  t_stat_df <- data.frame(gene_name = character(length(all_genes)),
                          t_statistic = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          p_value = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          avg_AUC_expression_men = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          avg_AUC_expression_women = numeric(length(all_genes)),
                          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
 
  calculate_auc_trapz <- function(row) {
      x <- as.numeric(c("0", "3", "6", "9", "12", "24", "48"))
      y <- as.numeric(row)                
      auc <- trapz(x, y)
      return(auc)
    }

  row_index <- 1
  
for (i in 1:length(all_genes)) {
    gene_name <- all_genes[i]
    
    geneid1 <- as.matrix(tapply(vsex$E[gene_name, ], list(sampleid, group), mean))
    geneid1 <- geneid1[rownames(geneid1) %in% sampleidmen, ]
    geneid1  <- geneid1 [, desired_order]
    geneid1[, 1:9] <- geneid1[, 1:9] - geneid1[, 1]
    geneid1 <- geneid1[, 3:9]
    rows_to_remove1 <- c(15)
    geneid1 <- geneid1[-rows_to_remove1, ]
    auc1 <- apply(geneid1, 1, calculate_auc_trapz)
    
    geneid2 <- as.matrix(tapply(vsex$E[gene_name, ], list(sampleid, group), mean))
    geneid2 <- geneid2[rownames(geneid2) %in% sampleiddifwomen, ]
    geneid2 <- geneid2 [, desired_order]
    geneid2 <- geneid2[, 1:9] - geneid2[, 1]
    geneid2 <- geneid2[, 3:9]
    rows_to_remove2 <- c(6)
    geneid2 <- geneid2[-rows_to_remove2, ]
    auc2 <- apply(geneid2, 1, calculate_auc_trapz)
    
    t_test_result <- t.test(auc1, auc2)
    
    t_stat_df[i, ] <- list(gene_name = gene_name,
                           t_statistic = t_test_result$statistic,
                           p_value = t_test_result$p.value,
                           auc_of_men = t_test_result$estimate[[1]],
                           auc_of_women = t_test_result$estimate[[2]])
  }
  
  return(t_stat_df)
}

t_test_results_all_genes <- perform_t_tests_all_genesAUC(efitsex$EList)
t_test_results_all_genes$padj <- p.adjust(t_test_results_all_genes$p_value, method = "BH")

t_test_all_genespval <- subset(t_test_results_all_genes, padj < 0.05)

higher_men_AUC <- t_test_all_genespval[t_test_all_genespval$avg_AUC_expression_men > t_test_all_genespval$avg_AUC_expression_women, ]
higher_women_AUC<- t_test_all_genespval[t_test_all_genespval$avg_AUC_expression_women > t_test_all_genespval$avg_AUC_expression_men, ]

menAUCup <- as.numeric(nrow(higher_men_AUC))
menAUCupgenes <- higher_men_AUC$gene_name
womenAUCup <- as.numeric(nrow(higher_women_AUC))
womenAUCupgenes <- higher_women_AUC$gene_name
totalAUCup <- as.numeric(nrow(t_test_results_all_genes)-(menAUCup + womenAUCup))

sexAUC <- data.frame(
  category = c("Greater in men", "Greater in women", "No sex differences"),
  value = c(menAUCup, womenAUCup, totalAUCup)
)

category_colorsUP <- c("#0d9cff", "#ef5197","lightgrey")
category_colorsDOWN <- c("#0d9cff", "#ef5197","lightgrey")

sexAUC$value_percentage <- (sexAUC$value / sum(sexAUC$value)) * 100

ggplot(sexAUC, aes(x = "", y = value_percentage, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1, stat = "identity", colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = category_colorsDOWN,
  labels = paste0(
    sexAUC$category, " (", 
    round(sexAUC$value_percentage, 2), "% - ", 
    sexAUC$value, " ", 
    ifelse(sexAUC$value == 1, "gene", "genes"), ")")) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = paste0("AUC of all genes differentially expressed in <span style='color:#0d9cff'>men</span> and <span style='color:#ef5197'>women</span>"),
       fill = NULL) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_markdown(size = 14),
        plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))
  
export::graph2doc(file="sexspecificAUC.docx", width=5.5, height=3.25)
```

#Baseline vs. exercise-induced genes (Fig 5d)
```{r}
malebaseline <- dplyr::filter(rna_compbaseline, rna_compbaseline$logFC > 0)
malebaselinegene <- rownames(malebaseline)
femalebaseline <- dplyr::filter(rna_compbaseline, rna_compbaseline$logFC < 0)
femalebaselinegene <- rownames(femalebaseline)
allgenes <- rownames(rna_compbaselineALL)

basesexgenesmen <- as.numeric(length(malebaselinegene))
basesexgeneswomen <- as.numeric(length(femalebaselinegene))
basesexgenesall <- as.numeric(length(allgenes)) - basesexgenesmen - basesexgeneswomen

sexbase <- data.frame(
  category = c("Greater in males", "Greater in females", "No sex differences"),
  value = c(basesexgenesmen, basesexgeneswomen, basesexgenesall)
)

category_colors <- c("#0d9cff", "#ef5197","lightgrey")

sexbase$value_percentage <- (sexbase$value / sum(sexbase$value)) * 100

ggplot(sexbase, aes(x = "", y = value_percentage, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1, stat = "identity", colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = category_colors,
    labels = paste0(
      sexbase$category, " (", 
      round(sexbase$value_percentage, 2), "% - ", 
      sexbase$value, " ", 
      ifelse(sexbase$value == 1, "gene", "genes"), ")"
    )
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = pi) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Genes with sex-specific baseline<br><span style='font-size:14pt;'>differential expression in <span style='color:#0d9cff'>males</span> and <span style='color:#ef5197'>females</span></span>",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_markdown(size = 14),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

export::graph2doc(file="sexspecificbaselinepiechart.docx", width=5.5, height=3.25)

top_treat_up <- function(coef, efit) {
    result <- topTreat(efit, coef = coef, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
    result <- subset(result, result$adj.P.Val < 0.05)
    result <- subset(result, result$logFC > 0)
    return(result)
}

top_treat_down <- function(coef, efit) {
    result <- topTreat(efit, coef = coef, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
    result <- subset(result, result$adj.P.Val < 0.05)
    result <- subset(result, result$logFC < 0)
    return(result)
}

MIDvsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(10, efitsex)
POSTvsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(11, efitsex)
H3vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(12, efitsex)
H6vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(13, efitsex)
H9vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(14, efitsex)
H12vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(15, efitsex)
H24vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(16, efitsex)
H48vsPREmen_up <- top_treat_up(17, efitsex)
  
MIDvsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(2, efitsex)
POSTvsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(3, efitsex)
H3vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(4, efitsex)
H6vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(5, efitsex)
H9vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(6, efitsex)
H12vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(7, efitsex)
H24vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(8, efitsex)
H48vsPREdifwomen_up <- top_treat_up(9, efitsex)

MIDvsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(10, efitsex)
POSTvsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(11, efitsex)
H3vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(12, efitsex)
H6vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(13, efitsex)
H9vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(14, efitsex)
H12vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(15, efitsex)
H24vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(16, efitsex)
H48vsPREmen_down <- top_treat_down(17, efitsex)
  
MIDvsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(2, efitsex)
POSTvsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(3, efitsex)
H3vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(4, efitsex)
H6vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(5, efitsex)
H9vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(6, efitsex)
H12vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(7, efitsex)
H24vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(8, efitsex)
H48vsPREdifwomen_down <- top_treat_down(9, efitsex)

women_up <- unique(c(
  rownames(MIDvsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(POSTvsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H3vsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H6vsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H9vsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H12vsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H24vsPREdifwomen_up),
  rownames(H48vsPREdifwomen_up)
))

women_down <- unique(c(
  rownames(MIDvsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(POSTvsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H3vsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H6vsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H9vsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H12vsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H24vsPREdifwomen_down),
  rownames(H48vsPREdifwomen_down)
))

men_up <- unique(c(
  rownames(MIDvsPREmen_up),
  rownames(POSTvsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H3vsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H6vsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H9vsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H12vsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H24vsPREmen_up),
  rownames(H48vsPREmen_up)
))

men_down <- unique(c(
  rownames(MIDvsPREmen_down),
  rownames(POSTvsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H3vsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H6vsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H9vsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H12vsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H24vsPREmen_down),
  rownames(H48vsPREmen_down)
))

all_women <- c(women_up, women_down)

all_women <- unique(all_women)

all_men <- c(men_up, men_down)

all_men <- unique(all_men)

length(intersect(all_men, all_women))

length(setdiff(all_men, all_women))

length(setdiff(all_women, all_men))

       
menmengenesup <- length(as.numeric(intersect(men_up,malebaselinegene)))
menwomengenesup <- length(as.numeric(intersect(women_up,malebaselinegene)))
womenwomengenesup <- length(as.numeric(intersect(women_up,femalebaselinegene)))
womenmengenesup <- length(as.numeric(intersect(men_up,femalebaselinegene)))

menmengenesdown <- length(as.numeric(intersect(men_down,malebaselinegene)))
menwomengenesdown <- length(as.numeric(intersect(women_down,malebaselinegene)))
womenwomengenesdown <- length(as.numeric(intersect(women_down,femalebaselinegene)))
womenmengenesdown <- length(as.numeric(intersect(men_down,femalebaselinegene)))

menbaselineexercisesum <- data.frame(
                          Number = c(menmengenesup, menwomengenesup, -menmengenesdown, -menwomengenesdown),
                          Sex = c("Men", "Women", "Men", "Women"))

womenbaselineexercisesum <- data.frame(
                          Number = c(womenmengenesup, womenwomengenesup, -womenmengenesdown, -womenwomengenesdown),
                          Sex = c("Men", "Women", "Men", "Women"))

ggplot(menbaselineexercisesum, aes(x = Sex, y = Number, colour = Sex)) +
  geom_col(fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
      "Men" = "#0d9cff",
      "Women" = "#ef5197")) +
  labs(x = NULL, fill = NULL, title = expression(atop("Genes with exercise-induced", "differential expression"))) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("     No. DEGs relative to PRE\n \n Downregulated  Upregulated"),
                     labels = function(x) abs(x), 
                     limits = c(-500, 350), 
                     breaks = seq(-500, 500, by = 100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Men" = "Males", "Women" = "Females")) +
  geom_text(data = menbaselineexercisesum, 
            aes(x = Sex, y = Number, label = abs(Number)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(menbaselineexercisesum$Number > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 4, colour = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.line.y = element_line(colour = "black", size = 1),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "black", size = 1),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust =0.5))

export::graph2doc(file="menbaselinexercise.docx", width=3, height=3.5)

ggplot(womenbaselineexercisesum, aes(x = Sex, y = Number, colour = Sex)) +
  geom_col(fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
      "Men" = "#0d9cff",
      "Women" = "#ef5197")) +
  labs(x = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("     No. DEGs relative to PRE\n \n Downregulated    Upregulated"),
                     labels = function(x) abs(x), 
                     limits = c(-450, 300), 
                     breaks = seq(-500, 500, by = 100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Men" = "Males", "Women" = "Females")) +

  geom_text(data = womenbaselineexercisesum, 
            aes(x = Sex, y = Number, label = abs(Number)),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            vjust = ifelse(womenbaselineexercisesum$Number > 0, -0.5, 1.5), 
            size = 4, colour = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.line.y = element_line(colour = "black", size = 1),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(colour = "black", size = 1),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "cm"))
  
export::graph2doc(file="womenbaselinexercise.docx", width=3, height=3)
```

#Enrichment for genes upregulated/downregulated between men and women (Fig 5e)
```{r}
MengenesMvW <- c(rownames(MIDvsPREmen), rownames(POSTvsPREmen), rownames(H3vsPREmen), rownames(H6vsPREmen), rownames(H9vsPREmen),
              rownames(H12vsPREmen), rownames(H24vsPREmen), rownames(H48vsPREmen))
MengenesMvW <- unique(MengenesMvW)

WomengenesMvW <- c(rownames(MIDvsPREdifwomen), rownames(POSTvsPREdifwomen), rownames(H3vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H6vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H9vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H12vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H24vsPREdifwomen), rownames(H48vsPREdifwomen))
WomengenesMvW <- unique(WomengenesMvW)

genesMvW  <- intersect(MengenesMvW, WomengenesMvW)

allgenesMvW <- unique(c(MengenesMvW, WomengenesMvW))

MvsW_individual_timepointsUP <- function(data1, data2, interaction) {
  
  genes_data1 <- rownames(data1[data1$logFC > 0, ])
  genes_data2 <- rownames(data2[data2$logFC > 0, ])

  unique_genes <- interaction(genes_data1, genes_data2)
  
  filtered_rna_comp <- data1[rownames(data1) %in% unique_genes, ]

  DE_data <- rownames(filtered_rna_comp)
   return(DE_data)
}

MvsW_individual_timepointsDOWN <- function(data1, data2, interaction) {
 
  genes_data1 <- rownames(data1[data1$logFC < 0, ])
  genes_data2 <- rownames(data2[data2$logFC < 0, ])

  unique_genes <- interaction(genes_data1, genes_data2)
  
  filtered_rna_comp <- data1[rownames(data1) %in% unique_genes, ]
  
  DE_data <- rownames(filtered_rna_comp)
   return(DE_data)
}

sexexerciseenrich <- function(specificgenestime_point, allgenestime_point, time_point, sex, direction) {
  
  if(length(specificgenestime_point) < 2) {
    return(data.frame(Time = time_point, Direction = direction, Sex = sex, Description = "regionalization",
                      ID = NA, GeneRatio = NA, BgRatio = NA, RichFactor = NA, FoldEnrichment = NA, zScore = NA, pvalue = NA, p.adjust = NA, qvalue = NA,
                      geneID = NA, Count = NA))
  }
  
  sexenrichment <- enrichGO(specificgenestime_point, OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
                            universe = rownames(allgenestime_point), keyType = "ENSEMBL",
                            ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
                            pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = FALSE, pool = FALSE)
  
  if (is.null(sexenrichment)) {
    return(data.frame(Time = time_point, Direction = direction, Sex = sex, Description = "No enrichment",
                      ID = NA, GeneRatio = NA, BgRatio = NA, RichFactor = NA, FoldEnrichment = NA, zScore = NA, pvalue = NA, p.adjust = NA, qvalue = NA,
                      geneID = NA, Count = NA))
  }
  
  sexenrichment  <- as.data.frame(sexenrichment@result) %>%
    arrange(p.adjust) %>%
    mutate(Time = time_point, Direction = direction, Sex = sex)
  
  return(sexenrichment)
}

MIDDOWNdifmen <- MvsW_individual_timepointsDOWN(MIDvsPREmen, MIDvsPREdifwomen, setdiff)
MIDDOWNdifmenenrich <- sexexerciseenrich(MIDDOWNdifmen, MIDvsPREmen, "MID", "Men", "Down")
POSTDOWNdifmen <- MvsW_individual_timepointsDOWN(POSTvsPREmen, POSTvsPREdifwomen, setdiff)
POSTDOWNdifmenenrich <- sexexerciseenrich(POSTDOWNdifmen, POSTvsPREmen, "+0 h", "Men", "Down")

MvsWchanges <- rbind(
  MIDDOWNdifmenenrich, POSTDOWNdifmenenrich, H3DOWNdifmenenrich, 
  H6DOWNdifmenenrich, H9DOWNdifmenenrich, H12DOWNdifmenenrich, 
  H24DOWNdifmenenrich, H48DOWNdifmenenrich, 
  MIDUPdifmenenrich, POSTUPdifmenenrich, H3UPdifmenenrich, 
  H6UPdifmenenrich, H9UPdifmenenrich, H12UPdifmenenrich, 
  H24UPdifmenenrich, H48UPdifmenenrich, 
  MIDDOWNdifdifwomenenrich, POSTDOWNdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H3DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, H6DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H9DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, H12DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H24DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, H48DOWNdifdifwomenenrich, 
  MIDUPdifdifwomenenrich, POSTUPdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H3UPdifdifwomenenrich, H6UPdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H9UPdifdifwomenenrich, H12UPdifdifwomenenrich, 
  H24UPdifdifwomenenrich, H48UPdifdifwomenenrich, 
  MIDDOWNsharedenrich, POSTDOWNsharedenrich, 
  H3DOWNsharedenrich, H6DOWNsharedenrich, 
  H9DOWNsharedenrich, H12DOWNsharedenrich, 
  H24DOWNsharedenrich, H48DOWNsharedenrich, 
  MIDUPsharedenrich, POSTUPsharedenrich, 
  H3UPsharedenrich, H6UPsharedenrich, 
  H9UPsharedenrich, H12UPsharedenrich, 
  H24UPsharedenrich, H48UPsharedenrich)

MvsWchanges <- MvsWchanges %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sex != "Shared") 
 #%>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

MvsWchanges$GeneRatio <- sapply(strsplit(MvsWchanges$GeneRatio, "/"), function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]))

MvsWchanges$Direction <- factor(MvsWchanges$Direction, levels=c("Up", "Down"))

MvsWchanges$Sex <- factor(MvsWchanges$Sex, levels = c("Men", "Women", "Shared"))

MvsWchanges$Time <- factor(MvsWchanges$Time, levels = c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h"))

sexstrip_background <- strip_nested(
  text_x = elem_list_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
  background_x = elem_list_rect(
    fill = c(
      "+0 h" = "#FFFF33",
      "+3 h" = "#9ef576", 
      "+6 h" = "#3b8739", 
      "+9 h" = "#34ebe8", 
      "+12 h" = "#3a09d9", 
      "+24 h" = "#a957b5", 
      "+48 h" = "#A65628",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3",
      "Up" = "#e5cdd3",
      "Down" = "#ced8e3"
    )
  )
)

MvsWchangesfixed <- MvsWchanges %>%
  mutate(Description = if_else(
    str_starts(Description, "rRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "ncRNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "RNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "tRNA") |  
    str_starts(Description, "DNA") | 
    str_starts(Description, "mRNA") |
    str_starts(Description, "ATP") |
    str_starts(Description, "miRNA"),
    Description,
    sub("^(\\w)(.*)", "\\U\\1\\L\\2", Description, perl = TRUE)
  ))

MvsWchangesfilter <- c("Nucleus organization", "RNA processing", "Cytoplasmic translation", "Actin cytoskeleton organization",  "Hemopoiesis", "Inflammatory response", "Angiogenesis", "Phagocytosis")
                       
MvsWchanges <- MvsWchangesfixed %>% dplyr::filter(Description %in% MvsWchangesfilter)

MvsWchanges$Description[MvsWchanges$Description == "Actin cytoskeleton organization"] <- "Actin cytoskeleton organisation"
MvsWchanges$Description[MvsWchanges$Description == "Nucleus organization"] <- "Nucleus organisation"


MvsWchanges$Description  <- factor(MvsWchanges$Description , levels = c("Nucleus organisation", "RNA processing", "Cytoplasmic translation", "Actin cytoskeleton organisation",  "Hemopoiesis", "Inflammatory response", "Angiogenesis", "Phagocytosis"), ordered = TRUE)

MvsWchanges$Description <- fct_rev(MvsWchanges$Description)

ggplot(MvsWchanges, aes(x = Sex, y = Description, size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of genes", range = c(0.5, 5.5),
                        breaks = c(10, 25, 50, 100), 
                        labels = c("10", "25", "50", "100")) +
  scale_color_gradientn(name = "Adjusted p-value", colours = c("red", "blue"),
                        limits = c(0, 0.05), breaks = seq(0.01, 0.05, by = 0.01),
                        na.value = "black") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Men" = "Males", "Women" = "Females")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = NULL) +
  ggtitle("GOBP enrichment of sex-specific exercise-induced DEGs") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.justification = "centre",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        legend.title.align = 0.5,
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 45,
                                   hjust = 1.25, vjust = 1.25, 
                                   colour = c("Men" = "#0d9cff",
                                              "Women" = "#ef5197")),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey80", color = "grey50"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "cm"),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm")) +
  facet_nested(. ~ Time * Direction, strip = sexstrip_background) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 1)), color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top"))

export::graph2doc(file="sexspecificgobpexercise.docx", width=9.25,height=4)
```

#Circadian rhythm DE (Supp fig 5a)
```{r}
plot_gene_expression <- function(ensembl,gene_name, lim1, lim2, lim3) {
  
  expression_data <- efit$EList$E
  timepoints <- c("MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h")
  desired_order <- c(5,2,4,7,6,3,8,9,1)
  
  mean_by_participant_timepoint <- as.matrix(tapply(expression_data[ensembl, ], 
                                                    list(sampleid, group), 
                                                    mean))

  gene_expression <- mean_by_participant_timepoint[, desired_order]
  gene_expression[, 1:9] <- gene_expression[, 1:9] - gene_expression[, 1]
  gene_expression <- as.data.frame(gene_expression)
  gene_expression <- dplyr::select(gene_expression, 2:9)
  colnames(gene_expression) <- timepoints
  
  mean_values <- apply(gene_expression, 2, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_values <- apply(gene_expression, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  summary_df <- data.frame(Time = names(mean_values),
                           Mean = mean_values,
                           Standard_Deviation = sd_values)
  
  summary_df$Time <- factor(summary_df$Time, levels = timepoints)
  
  regulation_status <- c(
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(MIDvsPRE)) ifelse(MIDvsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(POSTvsPRE)) ifelse(POSTvsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H3vsPRE)) ifelse(H3vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H6vsPRE)) ifelse(H6vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H9vsPRE)) ifelse(H9vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H12vsPRE)) ifelse(H12vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H24vsPRE)) ifelse(H24vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE",
    if (ensembl %in% rownames(H48vsPRE)) ifelse(H48vsPRE[ensembl, "logFC"] > 0, "Upregulated", "Downregulated") else "Not DE"
  )
  
  summary_df$Regulation <- regulation_status
  summary_df$Regulation <- factor(summary_df$Regulation, levels = c("Upregulated", "Not DE", "Downregulated"))

  p <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(y = Mean, x = Time, fill = Time)) + 
    geom_tile(aes(fill = Regulation), height = Inf, width = 1) +
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean - Standard_Deviation,
                      ymax = Mean + Standard_Deviation),
                  width = 0.5, size = 0.75) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 1, size = 5, show.legend=FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
       "MID" = "#FF7F00", 
        "+0 h" = "#FFFF33", 
        "+3 h" = "#9ef576", 
        "+6 h" = "#3b8739", 
        "+9 h" = "#34ebe8", 
        "+12 h" = "#3a09d9", 
        "+24 h" = "#a957b5", 
        "+48 h" = "#A65628",
        "Upregulated" = "#e5cdd3",
        "Downregulated" = "#ced8e3",
        "Not DE" = "white")) +
    labs(x= NULL, y = bquote(Log[2]*FC ~ "relative to PRE"), fill = "Differential expression") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
          axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 2, size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
          axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          plot.background = element_blank(),
          panel.background = element_blank()) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(lim1, lim2), breaks = seq(lim1,lim2, by = lim3),
                       labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    ggtitle(gene_name)
  
  return(list(plot = p, summary_df = summary_df))
}

result <- plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000179094", "PER1", -5, 1, 1)
result$plot
export::graph2doc(file="PER1.docx", width=5.8,height=2.5)

result <- plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000134852", "CLOCK", -1, 1, 0.5)
result$plot
export::graph2doc(file="CLOCK.docx", width=5.8,height=2.5)

result <- plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000133794", "BMAL1", -2, 4, 1)
result$plot
export::graph2doc(file="BMAL1.docx", width=5.8,height=2.5)

result <- plot_gene_expression("ENSG00000008405", "CRY1", -0.5, 2, 0.5)
result$plot
export::graph2doc(file="CRY1.docx", width=5.8,height=2.5)
```

#Compare circadian rhythm to Lundell et al. (Supp fig 5b)
```{r}
sampleidlist <- paste0("P", sprintf("%02d", 1:40))
time <- c(1,2,1,2,1,1,1,2,1,2,
          1,2,1,1,2,1,2,2,1,1,
          2,1,1,2,1,2,1,2,1,2,
          1,1,2,1,1,2,1,2,1,2)

biopsytimes <- data.frame(sampleidlist, time)
colnames(biopsytimes) <- c("sampleid", "time")

#Preparing our data
plot_gene_expression <- function(ensembl) {
  
  expression_data <-efit$EList$E
  timepoints1 <- c("7.30AM", "7.45AM", "8AM", "11AM", "2PM", "5PM", "8PM", "8AM 2", "biopsytime")
  timepoints2 <- c("8AM", "8.15AM", "8.30AM", "11.30AM", "2.30PM", "5.30PM", "8.30PM", "8.30AM 2", "biopsytime")
  desired_order <- c(5,2,4,7,6,3,8,9,1)
  
  mean_by_participant_timepoint <- as.matrix(tapply(expression_data[ensembl, ], 
                                                    list(sampleid, group), 
                                                    mean))
  gene_expression <- mean_by_participant_timepoint[, desired_order]
  gene_expression <- as.data.frame(gene_expression)
  gene_expression <- dplyr::select(gene_expression, 1:8)
  gene_expression$sampleid <- rownames(gene_expression)
  
  gene_expression <- merge(gene_expression, biopsytimes,
                           by.x = "sampleid", by.y = "sampleid", all.x = TRUE)
  
  gene_expression <- gene_expression %>% dplyr::select(-sampleid)
  
  gene_expression_1 <- gene_expression %>% dplyr::filter(time == 1)
  gene_expression_2 <- gene_expression %>% dplyr::filter(time == 2)
  
  colnames(gene_expression_1) <- timepoints1
  colnames(gene_expression_2) <- timepoints2
  
  gene_expression <- bind_rows(gene_expression_1, gene_expression_2)
  
  gene_expression[] <- lapply(gene_expression, function(x) if(is.numeric(x)) 2^x else x)
  
  gene_expression <- gene_expression %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -biopsytime,
      names_to = "Time",
      values_to = "Expression"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Study = "Taylor et al. 2025")
  
  gene_expression <- gene_expression %>% na.omit()
  
  return(gene_expression)
}

#LUNDELL ET AL. 2020
Lundell2020sampledata <- t(read.table("data/Previousstudies/circadian/GSE129843_series_matrix.txt", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE))
colnames(Lundell2020sampledata) <- gsub("^!", "", as.character(Lundell2020sampledata[1, ]))
Lundell2020sampledata <- as.data.frame(Lundell2020sampledata[-1, ])
Lundell2020sampledata$sampleid <- gsub(".*Participant: (\\d+).*", "\\1", Lundell2020sampledata$Sample_title)

Lundell2020sample <- read_tsv("data/Previousstudies/circadian/GSE129843_raw_counts_GRCh38.p13_NCBI.tsv")
Lundell2020sample <- as.data.frame(Lundell2020sample)
rownames(Lundell2020sample) <- Lundell2020sample$GeneID
Lundell2020sample <- Lundell2020sample[, -1 , drop = FALSE]

groupcirc <- Lundell2020sampledata[, 11]
groupcirc <- gsub("time point: ", "", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^7:00$", "AM7", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^11:00$", "AM11", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^15:00$", "PM3", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^19:00$", "PM7", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^23:00$", "PM11", groupcirc)
groupcirc <- gsub("^3:00$", "AM3", groupcirc)
ycirc <- DGEList(counts = Lundell2020sample, group = groupcirc)

feeding <- Lundell2020sampledata$Sample_characteristics_ch1
feeding <- gsub("sample type: ", "", feeding)
ycirc$feeding <- as.factor(feeding)
sampleidcirc <- Lundell2020sampledata$sampleid
ycirc$samples$sampleid <- as.factor(sampleidcirc)

cpm <- cpm(ycirc)
lcpm <- cpm(ycirc, log=TRUE)

L <- mean(ycirc$samples$lib.size) * 1e-6
M <- median(ycirc$samples$lib.size) * 1e-6
c(L, M)
summary(lcpm)

keep.exprs <- filterByExpr(ycirc, group=groupcirc)

ycirc <- ycirc[keep.exprs,,keep.lib.sizes=FALSE]
dim(ycirc)

totalcounts <- mean(ycirc$samples$lib.size) *1e-6

ycirc <- calcNormFactors(ycirc, method = "TMM")
ycirc$samples$norm.factors

designcirc <- model.matrix(~ 0 + groupcirc + feeding, data = ycirc$samples)
colnames(designcirc) <- gsub("groupcirc", "", colnames(designcirc))
colnames(designcirc) <- gsub("feedingUnrestricted feeding", "Unrestricted", colnames(designcirc))

contr.matrixcirc <- makeContrasts(
 "AM11" = AM11-AM7,
 "PM3" = PM3-AM7,
 "PM7" = PM7-AM7,
 "PM11" = PM11-AM7,
 "AM3" = AM3-AM7,
  levels = colnames(designcirc))
contr.matrixcirc

fitcirc <- voomLmFit(ycirc, design = designcirc, block = sampleidcirc, keep.EList = TRUE, plot = TRUE, save.plot = FALSE)
fitcirc <- contrasts.fit(fitcirc, contrasts=contr.matrixcirc)
efitcirc <- eBayes(fitcirc)

summary(decideTests(efitcirc, adjust.method = "BH"))

rna_compcircALL <- topTable(efitcirc, n=Inf, adjust.method = "BH")

rna_compcirc <- subset(rna_compcircALL, rna_compcircALL$adj.P.Val<0.05)

plot_gene_expression_lundell <- function(entrez) {
  
  vcirc_long <- as.data.frame(efitcirc$EList$E) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "gene") %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene == entrez) %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = "sampleid", values_to = "expression")
  
  merged_data <- merge(vcirc_long, Lundell2020sampledata, 
                       by.x = "sampleid", by.y = "Sample_geo_accession", all.x = TRUE)
  
  merged_data <- merged_data %>%
    separate(Sample_title, into = c("Feeding", "Time", "Participant"), 
             sep = " (?=\\d{2}:\\d{2})| (?=Participant:)", extra = "merge", fill = "right") %>%
    mutate(Participant = gsub("Participant: ", "", Participant))
  
  merged_data <- merged_data %>%
    mutate(Time = case_when(
      Time == "03:00" ~ "3AM",
      Time == "07:00" ~ "7AM",
      Time == "11:00" ~ "11AM",
      Time == "15:00" ~ "3PM",
      Time == "19:00" ~ "7PM",
      Time == "23:00" ~ "11PM",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
  
  merged_data <- merged_data %>%
    mutate(Expression = 2^expression)

  merged_data <- merged_data %>%
    dplyr::select(Expression, Time) %>%
    mutate(Study = "Lundell et al. 2020", biopsytime = "3") %>%
    na.omit()

  return(merged_data)
}

plot_normalized_gene_expression <- function(entrez_id, ensembl_id, gene_name) {
  
  LundellData <- plot_gene_expression_lundell(entrez_id)
  DaleData <- plot_gene_expression(ensembl_id)
  
  PER1 <- rbind(LundellData, DaleData)
  
  PER1 <- PER1 %>%
    mutate(Timeofday = case_when(
      Time == "11AM" ~ "1100",
      Time == "3PM" ~ "1500",
      Time == "7PM" ~ "1900",
      Time == "7AM" ~ "0700",
      Time == "8AM" ~ "0800",
      Time == "8.15AM" ~ "0825",
      Time == "8.30AM" ~ "0850",
      Time == "11.30AM" ~ "1150",
      Time == "2.30PM" ~ "1450",
      Time == "5.30PM" ~ "1750",
      Time == "8.30PM" ~ "2050",
      Time == "8.30AM 2" ~ "3250",
      Time == "7.45AM" ~ "0775",
      Time == "7.30AM" ~ "0750",
      Time == "11PM" ~ "2300",
      Time == "3AM" ~ "2700",
      Time == "2PM" ~ "1400",
      Time == "5PM" ~ "1700",
      Time == "8PM" ~ "2000",
      Time == "8AM 2" ~ "3200",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))

 if (!"Time" %in% colnames(PER1)) {
  PER1$Time <- NA_character_
  }

  PER1 <- PER1 %>%
   mutate(
    Time = case_when(
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "0750" ~ "PRE",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "0775" ~ "MID",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "0800" ~ "+0 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "1100" ~ "+3 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "1400" ~ "+6 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "1700" ~ "+9 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "2000" ~ "+12 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 2 & Timeofday == "3200" ~ "+24 h",
      
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "0800" ~ "PRE",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "0825" ~ "MID",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "0850" ~ "+0 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "1150" ~ "+3 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "1450" ~ "+6 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "1750" ~ "+9 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "2050" ~ "+12 h",
      Study == "Taylor et al. 2025" & biopsytime == 4 & Timeofday == "3250" ~ "+24 h",
      
      Study == "Lundell et al. 2020" & biopsytime == 3 ~ "Lundell et al. 2020",
      TRUE ~ Time
    )
  )

  PER1$Timeofday <- as.numeric(PER1$Timeofday)
  
  z_score_norm <- function(x) {
  return((x - mean(x)) / sd(x))
  }

  PER1 <- PER1 %>% 
    group_by(Study) %>% 
    mutate(Expression = z_score_norm(Expression)) %>% 
    ungroup()
  
  PER1lundell <- PER1 %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Study == "Lundell et al. 2020") %>%
    mutate(Period = (Timeofday - 700) / 100)

  fitlundell <- lm(Expression ~ cos(2 * pi * Period / 24) + sin(2 * pi * Period / 24), data = PER1lundell)
  
  period_values_lundell <- seq(min(PER1lundell$Period), 24, length.out = 200) 
  
  pred_datalundell <- data.frame(Period = period_values_lundell)
  pred_datalundell$predicted <- predict(fitlundell, newdata = pred_datalundell)
  
  pred_datalundell <- pred_datalundell %>%
    mutate(Study = "Lundell et al. 2020") %>%
    mutate(Timeofday = (Period + 7) * 100)
  
  PER1taylor <- PER1 %>% dplyr::filter(Study == "Taylor et al. 2025") %>%
    mutate(Period = (Timeofday - 700) / 100)
  
   fittaylor <- lm(Expression ~ cos(2 * pi * Period / 24) + sin(2 * pi * Period / 24), data = PER1taylor)
  
  period_values_taylor <- seq(min(PER1taylor$Period), 24.5, length.out = 200)
  
  pred_datataylor <- data.frame(Period = period_values_taylor)
  pred_datataylor$predicted <- predict(fittaylor, newdata = pred_datataylor)
  
  pred_datataylor <- pred_datataylor %>%
    mutate(Study = "Taylor et al. 2025") %>%
    mutate(Timeofday = (Period + 7) * 100)
  
  pred_data <- rbind(pred_datalundell, pred_datataylor)

  PER1$Time <- factor(PER1$Time, levels = c("PRE", "MID", "+0 h", "+3 h", "+6 h", "+9 h", "+12 h", "+24 h", "+48 h", "Lundell et al. 2020"))

  plot <- ggplot(PER1, aes(x = Timeofday, y = Expression, group = Study, colour = Time)) +
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 0), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = PER1, 
               aes(x = Timeofday, y = Expression, group = Study, colour = Time), 
               inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_line(data = pred_data, mapping = aes(x = Timeofday,
                                    y = predicted,
                                    colour = Study, group = Study),
              inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 1) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("Lundell et al. 2020" = "black", "Lundell" = "black", "Taylor et al. 2025" = "red", "PRE" = "#f01d1d", "MID" = "#FF7F00", "+0 h" = "#FFFF33", "+3 h" = "#9ef576", "+6 h" = "#3b8739", "+9 h" = "#34ebe8", "+12 h" = "#3a09d9", "+24 h" = "#a957b5")) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(0700, 1100, 1500, 1900, 2300, 2700, 3100),
      labels = c("7AM", "11AM", "3PM", "7PM", "11PM", "3AM", "7AM")) +
    labs(x = "Time of the day", y = "Relative scaled expression", colour = "Biopsy",
         title = gene_name) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_text(vjust = 2, size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
          axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1))
  
  return(list(plot = plot, data = PER1))
}

PER1  <- plot_normalized_gene_expression("5187", "ENSG00000179094", "PER1")$plot
CRY1  <- plot_normalized_gene_expression("1407", "ENSG00000008405", "CRY1")$plot
CLOCK <- plot_normalized_gene_expression("9575", "ENSG00000134852", "CLOCK")$plot
BMAL1 <- plot_normalized_gene_expression("406", "ENSG00000133794", "BMAL1")$plot

legend <- get_legend(PER1 + theme(legend.position = "right"))

PER1_nolegend  <- PER1 + theme(legend.position = "none")
CRY1_nolegend  <- CRY1 + theme(legend.position = "none")
CLOCK_nolegend <- CLOCK + theme(legend.position = "none")
BMAL1_nolegend <- BMAL1 + theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_grid_combined <- arrangeGrob(
  CLOCK_nolegend, BMAL1_nolegend,
  PER1_nolegend, CRY1_nolegend,
  nrow = 2
)

grid.arrange(
  plot_grid_combined,
  legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(4, 1)
)

graph2doc(file = "circadian_normalised.docx", width = 10, height = 6)
```

#Skeletal muscle regeneration GOBP (Supp fig 6a)
```{r}
GoINFLAM <- as.data.frame(mget(c("GO:0043403"),org.Hs.egGO2ALLEGS))

GoINFLAM <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "entrezgene_id"),
                  filters = "entrezgene_id",
                  values = GoINFLAM$`GO.0043403`,
                  mart = mart)

TotalDEsubset <- function(contrast, subset) {
  rownames_totalDE <- rownames(contrast)
  filtered_rows <- rownames_totalDE[rownames_totalDE %in% subset]
  return(contrast[filtered_rows, , drop = FALSE])}

process_DE_genes <- function(data, time_point, previous_genes) {
  
  DE_down <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC < 0)
  meanlogFCdown <- as.numeric(mean(DE_down$logFC))
  sdlogFCdown <-  as.numeric(sd(DE_down$logFC))
  DE_down <- rownames(DE_down)
  
  DE_down_previous <- intersect(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_previous <- length(DE_down_previous)
  DE_down_previous <- DE_down_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point, Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCdown) %>% cbind(sdlogFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  DE_down_previous$Genes <- -DE_down_previous$Genes
  
  DE_down_new <- setdiff(DE_down, previous_genes)
  DE_down_new <- length(DE_down_new)
  DE_down_new <- DE_down_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Down", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCdown) %>% cbind(sdlogFCdown)
  colnames(DE_down_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  DE_down_new$Genes <- -DE_down_new$Genes
  
  DE_up <- data %>% dplyr::filter(logFC > 0)
  meanlogFCup <- as.numeric(mean(DE_up$logFC))
  sdlogFCup <-  as.numeric(sd(DE_up$logFC))
  DE_up <- rownames(DE_up)
  
  DE_up_previous <- intersect(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_previous <- length(DE_up_previous)
  DE_up_previous <- DE_up_previous %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point, Previous = "Previously reported") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCup) %>% cbind(sdlogFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_previous) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  
  DE_up_new <- setdiff(DE_up, previous_genes)
  DE_up_new <- length(DE_up_new)
  DE_up_new <- DE_up_new %>% as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(Direction = "Up", Time = time_point, Previous = "Never") %>%
    cbind(meanlogFCup) %>% cbind(sdlogFCup)
  colnames(DE_up_new) <- c("Genes", "Direction", "Time", "Previous", "meanlogFC", "sdlogFC")
  
  DE_data <- rbind(DE_down_previous, DE_up_previous, DE_down_new, DE_up_new)
  return(DE_data)
}

INFLAMDE1 <- TotalDEsubset(MIDvsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE2 <- TotalDEsubset(POSTvsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE3 <- TotalDEsubset(H3vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE4 <- TotalDEsubset(H6vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE5 <- TotalDEsubset(H9vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE6 <- TotalDEsubset(H12vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE7 <- TotalDEsubset(H24vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)
INFLAMDE8 <- TotalDEsubset(H48vsPRE, GoINFLAM$ensembl_gene_id)

VO2MID <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("tMID", index))
VO2MID <- VO2MID$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE1 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE1, "MID", VO2MID)

VO2POST <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("tPOST", index))
VO2POST <- VO2POST$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE2 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE2, "+0 h", VO2POST)

VO2H3 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t3", index))
VO2H3 <- VO2H3$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE3 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE3, "+3 h", VO2H3)

VO2H6 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t6", index))
VO2H6 <- VO2H6$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE4 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE4, "+6 h", VO2H6)

VO2H9 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t9", index))
VO2H9 <- VO2H9$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE5 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE5, "+9 h", VO2H9)

VO2H12 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t12", index))
VO2H12 <- VO2H12$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE6 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE6, "+12 h", VO2H12)

VO2H24 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t24", index))
VO2H24 <- VO2H24$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE7 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE7, "+24 h", VO2H24)

VO2H48 <- subset(VO2correlatedfilter, grepl("t48", index))
VO2H48 <- VO2H48$gene
INFLAMMATIONDE8 <- process_DE_genes(INFLAMDE8, "+48 h", VO2H48)

INFLAMMATIONDE <- rbind (INFLAMMATIONDE1, INFLAMMATIONDE2, INFLAMMATIONDE3, INFLAMMATIONDE4, INFLAMMATIONDE5, INFLAMMATIONDE6, INFLAMMATIONDE7, INFLAMMATIONDE8)

INFLAMMATIONDE$Time <- as.character(INFLAMMATIONDE$Time)
INFLAMMATIONDE$Time <- factor(INFLAMMATIONDE$Time, levels = unique(INFLAMMATIONDE$Time))

time_palettecustom2 <- timecolours[-c(1)]

INFLAMMATIONDE <- INFLAMMATIONDE %>% mutate(Time_Direction = paste(Time, Direction, sep = "_"))

inflamvo2correlation <- as.character(expression("Correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max]))

shapename <- as.character(bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"))

ggplot(data = INFLAMMATIONDE, aes(x = Time, y = Genes, fill = Time, pattern = Previous)) + 
  geom_col_pattern(color = "black", 
                   pattern_fill = "black",
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "No. DEGs relative to PRE", fill = "Direction", 
       pattern = bquote("Correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max]),
       shape = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = time_palettecustom2) + 
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Never" = "none", "Previously reported" = "crosshatch"),
                       labels = c("Previously reported" = "Yes", "Never" = "No")) +
  geom_point(data = INFLAMMATIONDE, aes(x = Time, shape = Time, y = meanlogFC * 10), size = 4) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("MID" = 16,
                                "+0 h" = 16,
                                "+3 h" = 16,
                                "+6 h" = 16,
                                "+9 h" = 16,
                                "+12 h" = 16,
                                "+24 h" = 16,
                                "+48 h" = 16),
                     labels = c("MID" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+0 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+3 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+6 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+9 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+12 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+24 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                "+48 h" = bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"))) +
  geom_errorbar(data = INFLAMMATIONDE, 
                aes(ymin = (meanlogFC - sdlogFC) * 10,
                    ymax = (meanlogFC + sdlogFC) * 10),
                width = 0.5, size = 0.75) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = expression("        No. DEGs relative to PRE\n \n Downregulated                Upregulated"), 
                     sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * 0.1,
                                         name =  bquote("Average" ~ log[2] ~ "FC of DEGs relative to PRE"),
                                         breaks = c(-3, -2.5, -2, -1.5, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3), 
                                         labels = function(x) abs(x)),
                     limits = c(-20, 20),
                     breaks = seq(-20, 20, by = 5)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 5, l = 20)),
        axis.title.y.right = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 5, r = 5)),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10)) +
  ggtitle("Regulation of skeletal muscle regeneration (GO:0043403)") +
  guides( 
    fill = "none",
    pattern = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, override.aes = list(fill = "white")))

export::graph2doc(file="woundinflammation.docx", width=7.5,height=3.75)
```

#Venn plot for skeletal muscle regenerations DEGs (Supp fig 6b)
```{r}
H3acuteinflamvenn <- setdiff(rownames(INFLAMDE3), VO2H3)
H6acuteinflamvenn <- setdiff(rownames(INFLAMDE4), VO2H6)
H9acuteinflamvenn <- setdiff(rownames(INFLAMDE5), VO2H9)

setdiff(c(H3acuteinflamvenn, H9acuteinflamvenn), H6acuteinflamvenn)

setdiff(intersect(H3acuteinflamvenn,H9acuteinflamvenn), H6acuteinflamvenn)

both_H3_H9_not_H6 <- intersect(H3acuteinflamvenn, H9acuteinflamvenn)
both_H3_H9_not_H6 <- setdiff(both_H3_H9_not_H6, H6acuteinflamvenn)

venn.plot3 <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(
    "+3 h" = H3acuteinflamvenn,
    "+9 h" = H9acuteinflamvenn,
    "+6 h" = H6acuteinflamvenn
  ),
  category.names = c("+3 h", "+9 h", "+6 h"),
  fill = c("#9ef576","#34ebe8","#3b8739"),
  alpha = 0.2,
  cat.cex = 1,
  cex = 2,
  cat.col = c("#9ef576","#34ebe8","#3b8739"),
  margin = 0.15,
  cat.dist = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05),
  col = NA,
  filename = NULL
)

grid.newpage()

grid.draw(venn.plot3)

grid.text(
  "Regulation of skeletal muscle",
  x = 0.5, y = 0.14,
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  just = "center"
)

grid.text(
  "regeneration (GO:0043403) DEGs that are not",
  x = 0.5, y = 0.09,
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  just = "center"
)

grid.text(
  expression("correlated to V\u0307O"[2*max]),
  x = 0.5, y = 0.04,
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  just = "center"
)
```
